reviews.text:
My brother is a diagnosed paranoid schizophrenic and gets a check from the government every month. In 2017 he was arrested for evading arrest, a symptom of his schizophrenia. Instead of fighting for his rights, she had the paperwork filed and sealed. It wasn't till recently that the Western District Court of Texas (Austin division) agreed with my brother after he filed a petition for writ of habeas corpus pursuant to 28 U.S.C 2254 (ECF No 1).
Really sad that people who trust on others to defend their rights, seem to be the ones nobody cares about.
Very efficient, thorough, knowledgeable and friendly. I'm glad she was able to assist.

Elizabeth is very kind,generous, and helpful! She communicated very well and did everything in her power to help us! I would recommend her to anyone that is in need of her service! Thank you very much

Elizabeth Whited is remarkable,she represented me as a court appointed attorney. I was facing serious charges facing 20+ years behind bars. She worked diligently truly on my be half. I am free of all charges today!Due the facts. She firmly believes every person deserves Justice.
Mrs. whited has been an amazing attorney for me in the duration of my court case. 5/5 would recommend to anyone needing a good defense attorney.

Elizabeth is WONDERFUL. Thorough, helpful, and knowledgeable. Our case had some bits and pieces of complications and she worked through each thing. When she said it would be taken care of, it was done.

I have worked with Connie on a couple of occasions (specifically to review employment contracts before accepting a job), and I can confidently say that Connie is knowledgable, experienced, and offers quality advice. She is professional while at the same time personable and communicates well. Connie is a great advocate and an exceptional attorney!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much! We love helping health care professionals!

reviews.text: It is so easy to refer you when I hear things like this from our mutual clients: "Love her so far she is not stiff and is making it easy to work with."

I chose Bemis, Roach & Reed for representation in my Social Security Disability case and was assigned to Mr. Greg Reed, Esq. Greg is a phenomenal attorney and an outstanding person!
Greg is extremely well organized and was able to keep me calm and focused before and during my hearing. Working with Greg, I felt as if I was working with a friend. I knew he would do everything possible to ensure that he won my case. Although I was denied the first time (as many are), without hesitation, Greg filed an appeal and ultimately won my case.
If you or anyone you know is in need of a Social Security Disability Attorney, I HIGHLY RECOMMEND Greg Reed, Esq., he will not let you down!
Thank you Greg!!!
Highly recommend staff.very friendly and knowledge.Rhonda and her staff took time to explain documents with my mom and i.I am very happy with the service from this attorney.

They sent some paperwork for an evaluation by a physician, and some of the information was blatantly wrong, there were spelling mistakes, and they released private medical information they shouldn't have had access to. You'd think attorneys would be a little more professional and handle information with discretion. I guess not all attorneys are cut from the same cloth.

This firm has a history of accidentally sending confidential medical records and sensitive personal identification to the wrong claimants. They also bill work they pay college students $10/hour to do as work done by paralegals for $50/hour.
I felt the indignation of prejudice at this firm.
Went to him for real estate and business issues. Helpful, accommodating and honest individual to deal with.

I highly recommend Keesha Montoya as an exceptional family attorney.  She is very caring, knowledgeable, and works hard to obtain the best outcome.  She tells you everything you need to know and takes her time answering questions.  She does her research and she doesn't forget anything.  In the beginning, my son had no rights at all to his infant daughter, but  it didn't take her long to get overnight visits for my son.  Eventually, Ms. Montoya helped my son get 50% custody of his daughter and we still keep in touch with her.  I can't imagine using anyone other than Ms. Montoya for any family issues.

Thank you Ms.Montoya for getting me my granddaughter back when 10 other attorneys in California & Texas said it could not be done. You are the absolute best. Tanae you are awesome! I am forever grateful for your help and dedication.

If you are looking to assert your grand parent rights Ms Montoya is an expert family law attorney. HIGHLY RECOMMEND HER!

I have been a client of Keesha's for several years now. We have had long, in-depth conversations and that is a rare find amoung lawyers. I have never felt rushed or unheard. She is the type that will listen to everything detail and get the full picture. Very compassionate and somehow not jaded though she has been a lawyer for many successful years. Her best quality though, to be completely transparent with you and not just give lip service. She means what she says, which is exactly what you need if going to court. No one likes surprises. Let the surprises be for the opposing counsel. I truly believe she has an accute understanding of not only court, but personalities. In family court, you need someone who understands people along with law. Hope to have her in my corner for many more years to come. ❤❤❤
Great Office Wonderful Attorney !!!

Keesha is truly a dedicated professional and strives to be an advocate for the children she represents. Her level of compassion, ethics, and high moral standards are immediately evident. She advocates for father's rights of deserving fathers who are oftentimes overlooked. Keesha is very thorough and methodical in her processes to yield the best overall outcome with the most efficiency. I consider myself blessed that I found Keesha to represent my daughter and I. She has greatly assisted me in obtaining 50/50 custody of my daughter right at the outset of my case.  If you are seeking a compassionate, yet highly effective attorney to assist you in your family case; look no further than Keesha Montoya Law.

I would like to recommend Keesha Montoya as an excellent attorney.  She is very caring and extremely passionate about giving rights to deserving fathers.  My newborn daughter was basically snatched away from me when she was one month old, and her mother refused to let me see her.

I feel that God brought me to Ms. Montoya.  She immediately began working to get me rights to have access to my daughter.  Everyone told me that I didn't have a chance because my baby was an infant.  I believe Ms. Montoya set a precedent when she got me not only access to my daughter, but overnight visits as well.  I now have shared custody of my daughter and have her 50% of the time.  I am truly amazed at Ms. Montoya's dedication and determination.

Keesha Montoya fights with everything God gives us to make it right for the babies. Sadly dads aren't fighting as hard or are being frustrated because they think they don't have a chance.  We have to turn this around. She believes God intended Dads to be the key to their children's identity, spiritual/emotional growth and future success.

Because of Ms. Montoya's efforts, my life has been enriched and is fulfilling since I have equal rights to my daughter.  I highly recommend Keesha Montoya to anyone looking for a family attorney who fights for your rights.  She is located in Cedar Park, Texas.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting me (our office) with your beautiful Baby Girl. She’s perfect! Call anytime you need anything. Take care and blessings! K-

reviews.text: I was not a client of keesha Montoya but I paid to retain her in my brothers case. Keesha definitely gets the results you desire in your case. However it is ashame that we could not come to an agreement about paying the remaining balance. There is no denying Keesha did the job she was hired for but my family had to come together to pay the money we paid upfront. We are not a rich family and we really needed to pay the remaining balance in installments but unfortunately that is not an option for our family. I haven't  had a lot of experience with lawyers  but I didn't think this was how it was supposed to be.

Montoya Law is hands down the best at what she does. She represents the family and their needs in the courtroom and is just, honorable, and she means what she say's. I met Keesha through my previous attorney, and switched to her because of her work ethics and dedication. If that does not say enough. I believe in reviews as they are honest and come from genuine people and their experiences. She is also fair with her cost,  because family is more important...as well as doing what is right with amazing integrity. I cannot thank Keesha enough for all she has done.

Mr. Marcee projected confidence at a high level while handeling my case with which I was facing serious career ending charges. He worked well with the prosecutors, however never flinched when it came to working deals with them. As a former Army Officer and combat vet, he dedicates his effort in ensuring his clients get the best possible resolution out of their cases. I'm beyond pleased with his representation.

Joseph Marcee is very professional and handled my case with quickness and got the results that I needed. I would recommend his services to anyone. The woman in this law firm are amazing at what they do! I’m blessed to have them in my corner! May God send many Blessings to your families and continue to give y'all the strength you need to do the job y'all do on a daily! I can’t praise and thank you ladies enough for what y'all do!

Jennifer represented me in my divorce last summer and did a nice job. She's very responsive. She's often in court during the day, but will always get back to you after court hours.

Jennifer Smart worked very hard on a old case of mine this year. She did a wonderful job to get my bond reduced. She was very patient with me and helped me get my case dismissed.

reviews.text:
I am writing to express my concerns regarding the service I have received recently. As a client of West Short & Howell since 2008, I have always valued the excellent legal support your firm has provided to both my personal and business matters.

However, I have experienced some challenges in contacting my attorney through email and phone. Despite assurances that my messages would be relayed, I have not received a direct response or call back. In addition, my experience during a recent office visit was not satisfactory. I found the behavior of Sara, the receptionist, to be unprofessional and discourteous. Her lack of greeting upon my arrival and her rude, aggressive, and defensive responses when I inquired about the communication issues were quite disappointing. I suggest that Sara could benefit from additional customer service training to enhance client interactions.

Considering these concerns, I have decided to seek legal services from another firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: The last time we worked with Max was in December 2023, and we are sorry to see our relationship break down like this, but we believe Max's comments are unfair, not true and believe he left out some important facts.  Max had emailed one of our associate attorneys directly about setting up a time to talk with that attorney, and then called and left one message for him (in March), which was relayed to the associate attorney.  He did not set up a time to meet with the associate, but instead came into our office angry and raised his voice at our Office Manager and at our Legal Assistant, claiming he had called "3 or 4 times" and had emailed the associate "at least twice," neither of which is accurate.  When our Office Manager tried to set up a meeting for him, and provided him with our updated term and conditions for our services, he said he was taking his business elsewhere.

reviews.text:
I had the opportunity to consult with Chad Harlow (law partner) on a probate matter, and I came away extremely impressed. As an attorney myself with over two decades in the legal profession, I tend to evaluate legal advice carefully and from a fairly critical perspective. Chad stands out as a lawyer who combines deep subject-matter knowledge with a thoughtful and practical approach.

Chad is exceptionally knowledgeable in probate and estate matters. During our discussion, he quickly identified the key legal issues and walked through the potential options with precision. His analysis was clear, well-reasoned, and grounded in both the law and real-world practicality. He has a strong command of probate procedure and anticipates issues that could arise down the road—something that is invaluable in this area of law.

Equally important, Chad is personable and easy to talk to, which makes complex legal topics much easier to understand. He communicates in a straightforward, organized way and takes the time to ensure that the person he is advising fully understands the situation and the potential outcomes. That balance of professionalism and approachability is something not every attorney manages well, but Chad does it naturally.

From one attorney to another, I can say that Chad provides thoughtful, precise, and well-considered advice. He clearly takes his role seriously and approaches his work with diligence and care. Based on my experience speaking with him, I would feel confident referring friends, family members, or clients to him for probate and estate matters.

If you are looking for a skilled, knowledgeable probate attorney in Austin, Chad Harlow is someone I would recommend without hesitation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much for the kind words! Chad is a tremendous asset to our clients and we're glad you had a great experience with the firm.

One of the standout aspects of my experience was the clear and consistent communication. They made themselves available for calls and meetings, ensuring that I never felt out of the loop. This level of transparency fostered a sense of trust, which is crucial in any legal matter.

The attorneys at Massingill Attorneys meticulously reviewed every document and clause, ensuring that nothing was overlooked. Their diligence helped identify potential issues early on, allowing us to address them proactively and avoid complications down the line.

Their personalized approach made me feel valued as a client, and I appreciated their willingness to go the extra mile to achieve the best possible outcome.

They not only met my expectations but exceeded them, providing me with peace of mind during a potentially stressful process.

In conclusion, if you are seeking legal representation for business transactions, look no further than Massingill Attorneys. I wholeheartedly recommend their services and look forward to working with them again in the future.

reviews.text:
Hiring Mr. Timothy Griswold, has been great.

During calls, I felt he was knowledgable, kind and clearly understood my situation and concerns without putting pressure or being rushed. I appreciated the direct communication that let me understood since the beginning what was possible, what wasn’t and what legal risk carried each approach. He promptly drafted the legal document based on my requirements and redrafted one specific paragraph few times until I was comfortable with it.

The impression I had is that he is also good person since he cared advising me generally on my future sincerely and approached the all matter with fairness which is also important to me.

I highly recommend him

Attorney Tim Griswold prepared a new Last Will and Testament for me, along with all of the important documents that go with that process. I appreciated his legal advice and extreme professionalism and recommend him highly!

Tim is one of the best lawyers I have worked with.  His perspective and approach helps balance the emotion that one can be going through when impacted by the complex and illogical ways family law is used.  Thanks Tim always staying calm, cool and collected.

The communication was top notch and always felt very well informed and supported. I highly recommend Tim Griswold Law Firm to anyone in need of legal assistant. It’s clear they truly care about their clients and go above and beyond to deliver results .Thank you again Tim Griswold for your hard work and dedication.

“Exceptionally smart, responsive, and worth every penny.”
Tim is extremely intelligent and detailed, and he always got back to me quickly, every time I needed guidance. He’s not only sharp and professional, but also genuinely kind. You can tell he truly cares about his clients. The level of effort and clarity he brings is absolutely worth the investment. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for excellent legal help.

My wife and I are so grateful to have Tim as our attorney for our car accident case. He set a very practical strategy for our case and takes care of every step. He tried his best for our benefits. We’re so appreciated his support and if you’re looking for someone who is really care about you, he’s highly recommended.

Tim Griswold was refered by my friend. I found her is Professional, patient, focus and result oriented. He helped me settle my civil case smoothly. He Sat down and listen my appeal, spent time and understood my frustration, solve the divergence with my opponent effectively. All after all, I was surprised with his Chinese fluency. Recommend!

I can’t thank Tim enough for his support and dedication throughout my divorce. From day one, he was there for me, not just as a lawyer but as someone who genuinely cared about my well-being. He successfully won my case in court, went above and beyond to fight for my best interests, even working on weekends to address urgent matters. Tim took the time to thoroughly go through our property separation sheet and helped me navigate some really tough situations, especially when we were up against the opposing party’s aggressive and unfair lawsuit.
What really stands out to me, though, is the personal connection. His advice was always thoughtful, compassionate, grounded in integrity, helping me make the difficult decisions that were best for my future.
Tim is reliable, trustworthy, and fully committed to fighting for what’s right. I’m so incredibly grateful to have had someone like him by my side during such a difficult time. If you're looking for an attorney who genuinely cares, will always have your back, and will fight tirelessly for justice, I wholeheartedly recommend Tim.

In the darkest time of my life, I encountered Attorney Tim. I was going through an extremely frightening divorce, physically and mentally exhausted. Tim listened attentively to my story, diligently collected evidence, and researched various legal grounds and interpretations, swiftly devising a defense strategy. Initially aware of my reluctance to go to court, he tried tirelessly to communicate with my ex-husband. Unfortunately, my ex-husband was entirely uncooperative . Tim maintained the highest level of professionalism, making repeated efforts. Eventually, we realized communication was futile, and court became inevitable. With his exceptional expertise and unwavering professionalism, Tim ultimately won my case. Throughout the process, he not only fought for the maximum benefit of his client but also treated the client as a genuine person, understanding the tension, vulnerability, and pain in the divorce. Besides his outstanding legal knowledge and skills, he is patient and compassionate, sometimes acting not only as a great lawyer but also as a supportive counselor. I am immensely grateful to him and wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone in need. His high professional integrity and ethical standards make choosing him undoubtedly the best decision!
Easy to work with!

I was referred to Tim Griswold by a trusted friend. My small business was sued by a large company that was “well connected politically.”  As you can imagine, this was a stressful situation as I had never been sued in my 17yrs of business.

Tim is a good person. He is honest, fair and a fierce fighter. He is a military trained litigator/attorney. He doesn’t pressure you to do what is best for him, he does what you think is best for you and best for the win. He will give you honest feedback so you can make the best decision.

Tim is precise and detailed. His prepared  responses to the plaintiff and the court was professional, free of error, intelligent and timely. Tim helped me resolve my situation quickly; I am now stress free and winning.

Tim is a very excellent and professional lawyer. He helped me solve a big problem. Communication is very convenient. He is very patient and he can speak Chinese. Highly recommended👍 If friends are looking for lawyer Tim, they will definitely not go wrong.

Working with Tim has been an absolute pleasure. He has been very responsive and went above and beyond handling a legal matter.  I had two previous attorneys on this case and neither put the effort or dedication into achieving the desired outcome.  Super thankful for finding the right person and I highly recommend.

I whole-heartedly recommend Attorney Timothy Griswold.  Tim is proficient in both Englishand Chinese (it’s extremely difficult to find US attorneys who speak fluent Mandarin Chinese), has served in the US military for over  20 years, and is a veteran of Iraq.  He also has a strong sense of justice and is very trustworthy.  Over the course of the past several years, Tim has represented me in several commercial legal matters, business partnerships, traffic tickets, and as a defendant in a Civil lawsuit.  I was very pleased with the way he handled every one of these matters.  On the civil matter, he truly went to bat for me, and never backed down despite it dragging on for years due to Covid and being against a Goliath for a plaintiff.  In summary, I highly respect Tim’s professional skills, as well as his personal attributes, and unequivocally recommend Tim as a lawyer.
Tim is so professional and responsible. Very efficient.

I know Tim for last 5 years and he has helped me in Child support case and Divorce case.
I highly recommend people to hire him because of his following qualities and skills

Tim is one of the rare attorney I ever met because,
I did not see any other attorney who can feel your pain as much as Tim does. He understands that you are going through worst time of your life and he sympathies with you. I went through a personal hell where other attorneys will feed on your misery, exploit you, and take advantage of you. But he genuinely wants to help you to get through the hell you are in.

He is not like any other attorney who you call and expect the consulting fees right away. It gives you comfort that someone is there you can talk to get genuine and good advice. He makes sure you get right advice, regardless of if you hire him or not. Thats how much selfless he is. He breaks that barrier of fear, anxiety, and intimidation when an individual is so scared, insecure, helpless.

In regards of skill, I find him very knowledgeable and well versed with the law. He is very skilled in knowing what path you need to take in order to have the best outcome for your case. In my child support case, he was spot on about the law and codes to help me get through the case.

I hope this review helps other people to get right help from Tim who is a good hearted and very skillful attorney.

Mr. Griswold was indispensably helpful in working with me to navigate my divorce and provide the legal advice and guidance I needed.  On top of that, from the first time speaking with him, I noticed he was not only knowledgeable and professional, but also very understanding and insightful with respect to the emotional side of divorce.  He made observations in minutes that it took me years to realize.  Highly recommended.

My experience with Tim Griswold has been nothing less than amazing, professional, and successful. His selflessness, dedication, and availability cannot be expressed in words. The knowledge base and professionalism he presents is well above that of any other lawyer. I would highly recommend Tim Griswold.

I first heard about Tim by listening to a talk show he was being interviewed for on a Chinese radio station. I was very impressed by Tim's Chinese skills and background.  Later, my relatives had a complicated family lawsuit.  After consulting with Tim in person, I did not hesitate to hire him to represent me as a lawyer in this case. Tim is very knowledgeable in the legal field and always provides accurate legal advice. He is also very responsive.  Every time I had any questions, he replied very promptly.  Additionally, Tim speaks and writes Chinese fluently, so I never had any problem with communication.  Eventually, we won the lawsuit after a lengthy legal bout and long trial. If you ever need legal help, especially if you need to communicate in Chinese, I highly recommend consulting Tim first!  Thank you attorney Griswold!

reviews.text: Joe is absolutely amazing! We were in a bind trying to find a lawyer quickly. We contacted Joe and although he was completely full with clients, he agreed to have us come in and discuss our needs. Once we got there to meet him he was so friendly and knowledgeable. He agreed to take our case on even though he was very limited on time. He literally helped us from beginning to end with every small detail, explained things very thoroughly, and made sure we understood what our options were as well as the process for each option. By the time we were done Joe felt more like a friend than just our lawyer. He still takes the time to discuss things with us when we are unsure of how to proceed with something. He is an absolute blessing and we have been so greatful for the relationship we have gained with him. I highly, highly recommend Joe hands down!

It gives me a great deal of pleasure to comment, favorably, on my attorney, Joseph Anderson of Anderson law Firm in Round Rock,k Texas.  Normally, I'm "leary of lawyers.  After my initial meeting with Joe, my opinion has, of course, revised itself.  During my initial interview the environment of the office portrayed an air of calm and relaxation.  This inspired the ease of conversation and trust.  Joe offered useful, understandable advice to novices dealing with estate and estate planning.  His mannerisms are warm and sincere.  Joe does not show anxiety reflecting the need to rush through facts.  I definitely feel he is there for me and my family.

An Outstanding Law Firm!! I needed an experienced attorney to help and guide me through probate after the death of my husband. A friend recommended Joe Anderson.  I had a lot of fear just thinking about the process and of all the things that needed to be taken care of. Joe Anderson and his staff put me at ease. They are very honest, friendly, knowledgeable and professional. He explained everything step by step and helped me with my needs after probate. It is so refreshing to know that I have a lawyer who can help with all your legal needs while also educating and explaining legal matters in an easy to understand way. Anderson Law Firm is #1 when you are looking for an honest, knowledgeable, reliable, professional, friendly, and down-to-earth lawyer.  All of our estate planning needs (from probate to will to power of attorney and medical directive) have been completed due to the caring professionalism of Joe Anderson. I can't recommend this law firm highly enough.

Amazing law firm!!! I had never been to a lawyer before and was relieved when I met Joe Anderson. He is very friendly, easy to talk to, and professional. I'm not sure there's a legal question he can't answer. Very experienced and effective lawyer!
Honest and straightforward. Would definitely use him again.
I called requesting some advice and he was very gracious and forthcoming. He did not charge me for this consultation, I am grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you.

reviews.text: I checked every site I could and can’t find any warrants or traffic tickets

Reported mvba to the FTC. Mvba contacted me first by text then by postcard that I had traffic fines and if not paid I would be compelled by arrest to do so. Scammers! If I have traffic violations and court fees/fines it's news to me because no municipalities have contacted me in any manner. Also, it's BS putting this on a postcard where everyone at the local post office in my small town can see it.

Scammers. I received a “Notice of Outstanding Fine” from McCreary Veselka Bragg & Allen, P.C., Attorneys at Law, alleging a past due fine from the College Station TX Municipal Court. (I have not lived there in over 10 years.)  I contacted the College Station Municipal Court directly and was told I have no past-due fines and that the municipal court does not work with or contact this law firm. Do not call the number on these letters. Always verify directly with the municipal court using a confirmed phone number.
I received a text from them about delinquent traffic tickets I do not have it seem legit because it comes as a code - I will not call the number back to even check -Professionals will not text you
Scammers! Texting claiming unpaid traffic tickets and to call them to check the status of my "case".

Excellent resource for used car businesses and title loan shops. It can be hard to collect on predatory loans sometimes because desperate people in tight spots just can't be trusted. With MVBA that doesn't matter! Once you've squeezed the last drop of cash from your vict.... customer, they can help you turn a profit because, even at their lowest, a typical targe... customer usually holds on to a car before they finally sleeping under a bridge. Who needs to invest their own money in used car inventory when you can leverage the misfortunes of others? Wish I could give 6 stars!

SCAM! If I could give 0 stars, I would! We recieved a Notice of Intent to File Tax Foreclosure Lawsuit. Basically they are saying we owe $1000 in property taxes for Guadalupe County. This is a LIE! Our taxes are paid from our Escrow and our mortgage company confirmed we are completely paid up. Our mortgage company also connected us with their legal team and they are paying to represent us in a lawsuit against these crooks. Hope your ready! Scammers!!!
I was a client here trying to get more money from several people. This group promised me the world and failed to get me any additional money. Don’t fall for their tricks.
Glad I came here first I see they are sending a letter today glad I see this is a scam
I live in Oklahoma, and I receive monthly threatening violation notices about unpaid fines from this entity. It's a scam. Never been to Sanger, TX in my life.
it's a scam! got a fake warrant paper called the county and confirm there was no warrant! Beware!

FRAUD!!!
They sent me a letter last June 2024 stating that I owed a fine from 2019, a fine I had already paid, so I decided to ignore it. Two months later, they sent me the same letter again, saying the same thing. I had to go in person to the municipal court where they issued me the fine to see what was happening since I had already paid. To my surprise, I did have a fine that they never notified me of. I decided to pay it so I wouldn't owe anything at all. My balance was down to $0, so they sent me the letter again, now with the total balance owed, which is the exact amount I paid. I don't understand what they're gaining by sending this again and ruining people's days. But it's no problem. I have proof that the balance has been paid. I'll contact you when I can to see what's going on.
STOP SCAMMING PEOPLE!!! 😡
Sent me letters that I owed money for delinquent payments on my property. Checked and everything was paid up to date. Scammers!!!
scam

SCAM! Got a mailer saying I had a warrant for a minor ticket out of Rusk from 9 years ago! I've been pulled over recently,  I'm sure the officer would have mentioned it. Also, I checked Texas Dept of Safety, I have no record.

Zero stars to these scammers!!!!!! They sent my a mailer saying WARRANT NOTICE and had false docket numbers and false info to bait you in to calling them! Scam. Don't even know how they are considered attorneys. Do not give them any money. Said I had a "warrant" out of a place 500 miles away that I've never been to. I never leave reviews, but do NOT give these people money. This website should be shut down.
THIS PLACE IS A SCAM!! Sent me 2 post cards saying I have numerous unpaid fines! My tickets have always been paid!! If not texas will suspend your DL. Do NOT send them money!!!

I hired her for an employment law matter, where I was discriminated against because of my race. She helped me through the entire EEOC process and always checked on my well being! I was surprised she was a lawyer because of how great her quality of work and qualifications were! We prevailed and won the victory against the employer!

I highly recommend working with Nicole Conger. Her tenacity coupled with her impressive experience left me feeling empowered and confident. She always made me feel heard and never rushed our time together. She was honest and practical while also positive. I interviewed many different firms and chose to work with Nicole because of the level of attention I knew she could give my case, and the determination she communicated through her words and actions was unmatched.

Nicole has been an absolute godsend to work with, my partner had been very anxious over his employment case before calling her, and since then a weight has been lifted. Her positivity is infectious but she is also going to be very real with you, which for me is a perfect combination of empathy and professionalism.

I didn’t have a good experience with Nicole. I’m sure if I ever need legal counsel in the future she might be a good fit, But for now my experience was short and unpleasant. I contacted her through email for legal representation based on her reviews, however she sent me a list of other lawyers to contact because she said she’s booked and is the only person in her firm along with dealing with a death situation with losing another client.
reviews.ownerResponse: To anyone reading this review, anyone else would have said thank you for the multiple referrals I sent to you! Your words are only from the evil in your heart, especially because I told you I am so sorry but I just lost a client and to please pardon me.

reviews.text: I've seen her location of her law firm and I've seen that she can definitely win any case that's on mind because it's her specialty to do so .

Nicole was exactly the kind of lawyer you hope for in a situation you never planned to be in.

From the start, she took the time to actually understand the context, the power dynamics, and what mattered to me. At every step, I felt informed.

Nicole consistently gave advice that balanced legal reality with practical outcomes. When it came time to negotiate, she was firm, thoughtful, and effective.

What stood out most is trust. I always knew where things stood, what the tradeoffs were, and why a particular approach made sense. That level of clarity and professionalism is rare.

If you need an attorney who is smart, steady under pressure, and genuinely on your side, Nicole is exactly who you want in your corner.

Nicole C. was professional and handled my case with care. While the process had its challenges, she ultimately advocated for me and got the job done. She is very kind and straight to the point. Love that about her! Thank you for all your help !

Hands down the best Attorney around! She was so kind, very informative, and fought for everything i asked for! She went above and beyond to make sure I was heard and understood every step of the process! I highly recommend her! Couldn't have asked for a better Attorney/Client relationship!

Nicole isn’t just a good lawyer, she’s a GREAT person.  I may have never gotten my case resolved had it not been for the dedication and commitment of Nicole.  I spoke with several lawyers early on and I was only interested in an attorney who truly loved the LORD God, Jesus Christ and not just used lip service without any commitment.

Well, Nicole was all about commitment.  She contacted me on a regular basis and kept me informed of the situation and the progress of my case.  We just resolved my case and that all started with Nicole believing in the conditions of my case and the idea that my former employer had violated my rights and terminated me for alleged violations.

I can never repay Nicole for all that she’s done for me but I’m more than happy to let you all KNOW that if Nicole can help you, that’s what she’s going to do.  She’s a great person who just happens to be an attorney and she’s more than ready to fight for you.
Nicole is a breathe of fresh air!  I am very impressed with her skill set and wonderful personality 🤗.
Nicole is awesome, If anyone i know ask me about get a Attorney. I will say Nicole Conger of Austin Texas. She responds fast.

I reached out to Nicole regarding a specific issue after being referred by a friend who had previously worked with her. While she let me know she was booked, the response I received consisted of a broad list of attorney referrals spanning multiple unrelated practice areas (employment, criminal, personal injury, defense), followed by a message indicating uncertainty about which attorneys might actually be appropriate for my issue. It started with “my heart breaks for your story” which at first felt very sincere but when she threw out all these recommendations it began to feel very copy paste.

I understand that solo practitioners have limited capacity, and I appreciate being told upfront when someone is unavailable. However, the lack of clarity and specificity in the referrals — especially for a very defined area of law — left me feeling that my issue hadn’t been fully understood or thoughtfully considered.

Based on this interaction, I decided to seek counsel elsewhere. I’m sure this firm may be a good fit for others, but this experience did not align with what I was looking for in initial intake or guidance.

Update: Soon after posting my original review, I was contacted directly by the attorney and asked to remove or change the review immediately. She explained that she was dealing with the death of a client two days ago but a previous review with similar language said a client died four plus weeks ago.

I explained that I would only consider updating my review after a future positive interaction and declined to make changes on demand before that point. The call became tense when I would not agree to do so. Being contacted and pressured regarding an honest review made me uncomfortable and reinforced my decision to seek counsel elsewhere.

At this time I cannot recommend her firm. I hope things change for her in a positive direction and wish her the best.
reviews.ownerResponse: First of all, the information in both reviews were total lies. Your first review words were that I knew someone who sent you to me. I called you twice to reach you when I got the review, and of course, I asked for you to remove the review, as no lawyer would not make that ask. You are not a client and your experience was not that of a client. Next, I asked you who the person was who sent you to me. When you said your friend's name, I had absolutely no idea who that person was. Hence, you lied from the start on your review. You said that you were getting ready and could not hear me, and I repeated three times, friend I lost a client three weeks ago. I said that I could fit you in for a call, in about two weeks. You then said you understood death but that I should actually consider the facts of your case. With no remorse and absolute entitlement, I will continue speaking to folks who are instant family, fill me with kindness, and that show me honor, and leave me positive reviews with truth, instead of trying to leave a bad review of entitlement. For the references out, I actually have people call in for a wide range of issues beyond employment who shout a praise of thanks for even contacting them back personally as the Owner and only Attorney and providing such helpful support.

reviews.text:
Working with Nicole Conger has been one of the most uplifting and empowering experiences of my life. From the very first conversation, Nicole made me feel heard, believed, and supported during a time when my world felt upside down. She didn’t just take my case,  she took on my fight as if it were her own.

Nicole’s compassion is unmatched, and her dedication is extraordinary. She communicates with clarity, honesty, and genuine care. Every message, every update, and every action she takes reminds me that I’m not alone and that someone truly brilliant is standing in my corner.

Her knowledge of employment law is incredible, but what truly sets her apart is her heart. Nicole brings warmth into a process that can feel cold. She brings confidence when doubt starts creeping in. She brings hope where others might see obstacles.

I’ve watched her handle my case with unwavering professionalism, strategic precision, and a calm strength that gives me peace of mind every single day. She never rushes, never pressures, and never makes me feel like just another file. I feel like a person she genuinely cares for, and that means everything.

Choosing Nicole as my attorney was one of the best decisions I’ve ever made. She helped restore my confidence, my dignity, and my belief that justice can be done. I’m truly grateful for her, not only as a lawyer, but as a remarkable human being.

I would recommend Nicole to anyone who needs an advocate who is smart, fearless, compassionate, and deeply committed to doing what’s right. She is simply the best.

Nicole is a person that makes you feel like family and will fight for your rights. She has been so easy to talk to in a horrible situation and I never felt judged always supported. You do need need to look further if you are looking for someone who is honest, has integrity and will always be available for questions or concerns. My case was settled in a short time and she did all the leg work. I am truly grateful for her professionalism and compassion along the way.
Thanks Nicole, you were professional and helpful on resources provided and directives for a resolution.
Nicole was professional, compassionate, and handled our case with dignity. I would recommend her to everyone I know.
This is by far the BEST law firm I have ever hired. I had the privilege to work with Nicole and she held my hand through the entire process. Thank you so much ❤️

Nicole Conger is the best attorney I’ve ever had. She helped my partner and me with a case that had been going on for over four years, and she handled it with so much care, professionalism, and confidence. Thanks to her, we finally have peace and closure. I can’t recommend her enough, she truly brought so much relief and joy back into our lives. 10/10!

Nicole is one of the most genuine and compassionate attorneys I’ve ever met. She truly listens and fights for you and what is right.  You can tell she cares deeply about what she does. If you’re facing discrimination or just need someone who will stand up for you with integrity and heart, I can’t recommend Nicole enough. She held me during one of the most challenging times of my life.

I am in settlements for the next two weeks! We chatted in detail for an hour. I will not be able to respond for at least that long because of the multi-client settlements. Here is copy of my original text  to send or say to them!

I cannot help you right now because I do not know for sure that there are violations of the law. You also said you understood that.

————-

Original review above.

Yes, we talked for about 15 minutes at like 7:30 PM and you were obviously drunk.  I guess it seemed like an hour to you.

Yes, I sent you songs, so what?

I was in crisis and reaching out to you to help me.

Instead of listening to what I had to say, you recommended that I contact a bunch of other lawyers and claim a bunch of other things insofar as discrimination.  I told you Gina and FMLA, and you wanted me to complain about a lot of other things that are ancillary to the meat of my case.

If you need the opinions of other attorneys to decide whether you should take a case, you probably shouldn’t have your own law firm.

I’m the one suffering.  Why should I do the extra work calling other lawyers to send you their opinions.  Are you not capable of forming your own valid opinion on a case without first hearing that several other attorneys are on my side?

Are you not capable of seeking those other opinions yourself?

Today, I wrote you apologizing that we got off on you wrong foot, asking you to reconsider, letting you know that I went and contacted other attorneys on my own, without your help; The response below is all I received in return.

Hope you’re enjoying happy hour!

Cheers!
reviews.ownerResponse:
First, your case had many layers to it. I only take a case when I am certain that there are violations. I spent almost an hour or more on the intake phone call. Then I sent you a link for referrals of up to 100 other labor lawyers for their consideration to help you!

Second, I gave you steps to follow which I sent to you multiple times. Then you began threatening me with bad reviews. After our call, I learned that I was in a multi-client settlement. You then wrote to me up to 63 more times via text message in that one evening as harassment and you laughed or mocked me when I said that my time goes first to current clients.

You first started with sweetness or something similar and also sent songs and then I said I was too busy you got more and more angry. You also stated that you were wasted.

Since then, I blocked you and you wrote today asking for help. To anyone reading this please know that this review is not truthful for a usual exchange with an intake!

reviews.text: All I can say is Nicole will fight for you with all her heart. She is compassionate, thorough, and was attentive to every single detail in our case. We won against all odds. Thank you Nicole. We will be forever greatful!

I recently had a consultation with Nicole Michelle Conger regarding a personal injury matter, and I was very impressed with her professionalism and knowledge. She took the time to listen carefully to my situation, explained my options clearly, and provided honest, thoughtful guidance. Nicole made me feel comfortable and confident in understanding the next steps of my case. I truly appreciate her professionalism, attention to detail, and genuine care for her clients. Highly recommend her to anyone seeking a skilled and compassionate personal injury attorney

Let me start by recognizing the dedication of this wonderful law firm! Nicole spent over 2 and half years working her tail off on a suit for me! Which in the end turned out to be the biggest blessing from God!!! I am so thankful for everything this firm went through for me, the battles, the struggles, the victory!!! Thank you again Nicole you will be forever etched in my life... If anyone is reading this and looking for a law firm above all this is where you need to be!!!!
Amazing lawyer who knows how to handle difficult discrimination cases against Forbes 500 companies and win! Best attorney in Texas by far! 5 out of 5 stars!

This guy was outright rude, unprepared, cocky, did not review case information, put me in the wrong venue, did not show up at my depo, and more.  We almost fired him in fact.   But - Nicole assured to stay with him.  And ultimately — her recommendation was the difference in the results of my case and the bad turn in our relationship.  Trust eroded and I ultimately wasted years of my life on a case that was literally tossed away….

Nicole has been nothing but fantastic! Between her fast response time, walking me through all the associated technicals, and addressing any question I may have I can't recommend her enough. If you are in need of a lawyer look no further, she is here to help every step of the way.

I reached out to Nicole Conger for legal representation, and although she had a full caseload, she responded promptly to my online inquiry. Highly recommend Nicole for her dedication and care!

Very compassionate person! Ms. Conger took time to help me even though she’s client heavy busy.
Thank you ❤️
AJ

Nicole is a true angel and a remarkable attorney. She treats her clients with the utmost compassion and kindness, always making you feel heard and supported during even the most stressful times. Her determination and expertise were key in navigating the complexities of my disability case, and she fought tirelessly to ensure a positive outcome. I cannot recommend Nicole enough for anyone in need of a dedicated, empathetic, and formidable advocate.

Update: 9-21-2024 Nicole is EVERYTHING!!! My biggest advocate, support, and friend. Who can say that about an attorney???? I can. She fights hard, she is driven, ambitious, has never ending energy. She marches to the best of her own drum and welcomes all to join her. I love you Nicole, you are my rock!

Ms. Conger has been my biggest champion during the most painful career experience of my life.
After contacting 4 attorney's regarding my employer (3 didn't return my call and one said that their case load was too large to take on my situation), she was the only attorney who called me as soon as she received my email (and I'm talking, in the evening on a weekend).
Ms. Conger listened, was empathetic but also fierce! She explained how the process works, gave free legal advice, never once asked for a penny. This is a woman who truly believes in justice. She isn't out for a quick buck, won't take just any case, won't settle to receive a quick payout from a corporation for herself, allowing her client to flounder with no representation or direction.
Ms. Conger is not only a phenomenal attorney, she is a wonderful human being. She was the first person to wish me a Happy Easter.  We have had personal conversations unrelated to my case.
Ms. Conger is more than an attorney. She makes me feel like an equal, a friend, a family member, a person that deserves to be respected and honored as a human being. I'm not a number to her and therefore, I'm not a number to any corporation, no matter how big or small. I matter. I am worthy. I am valuable. Thank you Ms. Conger for seeing my worth, honoring it, and being my courage, shield, and voice when I've felt like crumbling.

Nicole is so responsive and willing to go above and beyond to support her clients! I have been so fortunate to have her in my corner & every step of the unfortunate journey that she’s assisted me with during my employment journey. I cannot recommend her enough! 10/10 experience
She really reached out and tried to help. Thanks !

I hired Nicole to handle a pregnancy discrimination case and she was incredible throughout the entire process. The process ended up taking longer than expected but Nicole was by my side and responsive throughout the entire process. She’s incredibly warm and jovial and easy to get along with. I couldn’t be happier with her services and most of all her appetite to fight for her clients and justice

Nicole was such a big help with everything. She went above and beyond expectations. She explains everything that is going on in detail, so it is easy for the people that don't speak legal terms. Highly recommend!!!

I have never been through any type of legal ordeal, so this was all new to me. Nicole walked me through the EEOC and mediation process step-by-step, several times even calling me after typical “work hours”. She has such an incredibly compassionate heart AND is a fierce attorney to have on your side. I was so very timid to take legal action in regards to my previous employer and now I am so grateful to have done so - Nicole helped me feel heard, validated and aided in giving me a sense of closure when it was all said and done. I walked away with a financial settlement that I was satisfied with after Nicole fighting for hours and hours on my behalf. If you’re on the fence: reach out to Nicole. She will be your voice and your biggest champion!
5 stars isn’t enough for this SUPERSTAR of an amazing WOMAN!

I reached out to Nicole for a consultation and she was amazing. Very supportive, informative, and passionate. While we did not end up pursing legal action, she will be the first I go to if I ever find myself in a similar situation and the first I recommend to anyone else.

Not just a good lawyer but a good PERSON! Couldn't have asked for a better lawyer OR person to guide me through this process. Her reviews speak for themselves. If you are looking for a lawyer to reach out to, stop. You found the one!

I initially reached out to Nicole for a consultation when I started to suspect discrimination with my previous employer. She couldn’t give me much information at that time but her compassion and sympathy for my situation made me turn to her the moment I was let go. I was shocked and vulnerable and she is the exact person I needed on my side fighting for me. She kept me in the loop at all times and thoroughly explained all my options every step of the way until we arrived to a settlement. I hope to never have to need her legal assistance again, but appreciate I can now consider her a friend in my corner.

Nicole was a steadfast advisor during the hardest fight of my life. She is so kind, and offered me advice even when I didn’t want to hear it. Because of her knowledge my settlement was successful. I would 100% recommend her to others in my situation.

Ms. Conger represented me in one of the hardest and darkest times of my life. With little family and friends for support, I didn't know which way was up and which way was down. I had never hired an attorney before and had never been faced with a situation such as the one at hand. Nicole supported me and radiated positivity and kindness like I had never seen before. She walked with me hand-in-hand and step-by-step throughout the entire process. Nicole treated me with respect and was patient with me and believed in me even when I didn't believe in myself. I cannot say enough good things about Ms. Conger. Don't even think twice, hire her immediately! You absolutely will not regret it!

reviews.text:
When you’re facing something serious, you quickly learn who truly stands by you. Holden Joseph and the entire team at Winters & Chidester did exactly that for me.

From the start, Holden stayed in contact and made sure I was never left wondering what was happening with my case. Every time there was an update, he reached out right away. That level of communication and commitment meant a lot during a very hard time, and the team at Winters & Chidester always made me feel supported throughout the process.

What impressed me the most was that Holden never gave up. He fought hard for me, believed in my case, and stayed determined to get to the truth. Because of his dedication and hard work, he was able to prove my innocence and get my cases dismissed. That’s something I will never forget, and I will always be grateful for what he and the team at Winters & Chidester did for me.

He truly earns every one of these five stars: one star for communication because I was always informed and never left in the dark; one star for commitment because Holden stayed persistent and never stopped fighting for me; one star for integrity because he genuinely cared about doing what was right; one star for professionalism because he handled everything with confidence and experience; and the final star for results because he helped clear my name and get my cases dismissed.

Not every attorney or law firm will stand by you the way Holden Joseph and the team at Winters & Chidester did for me. If you need someone who will truly fight for you and not give up, I highly recommend them.

Thank you again for everything.

Sincerely,Andrew Garcia

reviews.text:
Please think very carefully before choosing Farah as your lawyer.

Our experience was extremely disappointing and financially draining. We paid over $17,000 in legal fees for a divorce case and did not see meaningful progress or a final resolution. After such a significant investment, we expected clear communication, guidance, and strong representation. Instead, we were left feeling unsupported and without closure.

Communication became inconsistent, and many emails went unanswered. At a very stressful and emotional time, we felt left in the dark about the status of our case. Rather than helping us reach a proper conclusion, she has indicated she is withdrawing from representation, leaving the matter unresolved.

This process felt far more focused on billing than on achieving results. I strongly urge anyone considering hiring Farah to thoroughly research and ask detailed questions before making that decision.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your review. Of course, we are very concerned whenever we see that a client has been dissatisfied with our services. First, even though this review was submitted in English, this client is not fluent in English. The language barrier was pointed out to the client in advance of retaining Ms. Ahmed. Nevertheless, the client insisted upon having Ms. Ahmed represent her. The language barrier required that each communication directly with the client, and all preparation for hearings as well as the hearings themselves, had to involve an interpreter and a third-party advocate. This obviously delayed communications and opened the door to miscommunications. In addition, the client often did not communicate, but rather had various family members and a third party communicate on her behalf. Because we are bound by client confidentiality, Ms. Ahmed could not respond to the family members or the client’s third-party advocate.

Despite the client’s claim of unclear communication, weak guidance and weak representation, she received very favorable outcomes in two temporary orders hearings, one providing her with custody, child support, financial maintenance, and the other order attorney’s fees to be paid by her opposing party. These positive results are clearly indicative of the quality of our representation.

As to the amount paid by the client, our documented records indicate $12,000, not the “over $17,000” claimed by the client. When Ms. Ahmed asked for the retainer to be replenished (as provided for in our contract signed by the client at the onset of representation) the client indicated that she did not have the funds. Yet she actually asked Ms. Ahmed to continue to represent her. Obviously, we cannot continue representation without compensation.

Subsequently, we were advised by the State Bar of Texas that a grievance was filed with the Texas State Bar. That grievance was promptly dismissed as not finding any professional misconduct.

The positive results at the two hearings clearly indicate Ms. Ahmed performed successfully. In addition to her complaint, this client and/or her friends and family are apparently engaging in an apparent attempt to manipulate our ratings by submitting a total of seven one-star reviews with inaccurate negative observations. Six of these reviews clearly violate Google’s strict rules that reviews may only be submitted by the client/customer. We are taking appropriate actions to address these fraudulent reviews.

reviews.text:
We hired this attorney to represent us in a divorce case and paid over $17,000 in legal fees. Unfortunately, despite the significant amount spent, we did not receive the progress or resolution we expected. Our case remains without a complete conclusion, and we feel we were left without clear direction or closure.

Communication became a major issue. Emails often went unanswered, and we were not kept adequately informed about the status of our case. At this point, she has indicated she is withdrawing from counsel, yet there has been no clear transition or formal resolution, which has left us feeling confused and unsupported.

From our experience, the process felt heavily focused on billing rather than achieving meaningful results. We understand that legal matters are complex and outcomes cannot be guaranteed, but we expected stronger advocacy, clearer communication, and a more definitive strategy after such a substantial financial investment.

We hope this feedback encourages improved communication and transparency for future clients.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts. However, our records indicate that you were not a client of our firm. While we understand that family law matters can be emotionally difficult for everyone involved, Google’s policies require reviews to be based solely on personal service experiences by the individual client. We have reported this to Google as an inappropriate review.

In addition, in response to a grievance filed by a friend or family member of the compainant with The Office of Chief Disciplinary Counsel of the State Bar of Texas, the State Bar just responded on February 25, 2026 as follows:

"This office has examined the Grievance and determined that the information alleged does not demonstrate Professional Misconduct or a Disability we have concluded that you are not a person listed in Rule 1.06G(2). Therefore, this matter has been classified as an Inquiry and dismissed.”

We will respond directly to the complainant shortly.

reviews.text: It's been 10 years since the last time I chose Mrs. Brown to represent me. I still have problems with my ex wife asking for more child support. Mrs. Brown made me lose my 401k, my property, and never did anything to help me win anything is court. My ex doesn't even let me see my children for 6 years now. After I lost everything in court, Mrs. Brown and my ex wives lawyer went out for brunch. I would have let it go, yet I'm still haunted by all the damage that was done to me. Now I have a respirator and take medication for my heart. I was young and she knew this. No person should ever suffer like this. I won't expose my name, but I know that Mrs. Brown will remember this case. I'm not a phony person like you mentioned on your reply.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your review, Mr. X. Of course, we are unable to provide a specific response for two reasons: First, you chose to use a pseudonym so we cannot research it. Secondly, we have handled hundreds of family law cases over the past ten years and it is impossible for us to remember every one. Having said that, we offer the following:
• We cannot recall even a single case handled by our firm in which one of our clients lost everything. Judges are reluctant to order dramatically lopsided property divisions, let alone award everything to one party and nothing to the other.
• We are very sorry Mr. X’s wife has not let him see his children for six years. But anything that happens after a divorce is adjudicated by a judge is final and is beyond our control. Mr. X would almost certainly have been granted visitation under all but the most egregious circumstances. Mr. X could have refiled a case against his ex-wife if she denied him visitation.
• The condition of Mr. X’s health is, of course, very distressing. We hope and pray he obtains quality medical care to address his health issues

reviews.text: A couple years ago 2022( time frame here is important!) I hired Farrah to help us gain full custody and adoption with parental rights taken from biological father. She did that. We were grateful. We asked how we were supposed to get the birth certificate she said I had to contact county clerk for the paper work and that’s all the information we were given. We got the paper work and the money and we went to the place to try to get the new birth certificate. They told us our attorney never filled the necessary paperwork and now we either needed our attorney to do what they were supposed to do or now we would have to do it all ourselves. We call Farrah and she tells us that this isn’t their job and it’s on us to go back to the county clerk and figure it out. Mind you she knew this and didn’t tell us anything about this. You would think after payments of thousands of dollars she would have been able to help us. Well now we are still stressed trying to figure out the birth certificate for health insurance purposes and my son would like to be home schooled but they need his new birth certificate to enroll him. We are still paying on the loan we had to take out to pay for her services to be abandoned with no information. More than likely we will get some sort of response about how it’s not their fault as I see another review has received. They get the job done ish. She got us through the court process but when I tell you she legit charges you if you speak for less than 5 minutes but yet can’t spend the few minutes to file the paperwork that the people in charge told me she was responsible for filing. Even after we went to court the last time I received another bill for god knows what I wish I remembered. But they will bill you for even more money and not tell you the job wasn’t completed. Just make sure you know exactly what you need done and what of it they will actually do. It’s a LOT of money to still be dealing with this years later.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Buxton,,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We truly appreciate your feedback and understand how frustrating and stressful this situation has been for you and your family. Our goal is always to provide thorough and supportive legal services, and we regret that you feel we fell short in this aspect.

We are pleased that we were able to assist you in successfully completing the termination and adoption that you were seeking. Regarding the birth certificate, we sincerely apologize for any misunderstanding about the steps required following the adoption. Our records indicate that we provided guidance on how to complete the process independently, as discussed at the conclusion of your case. However, we understand that navigating these administrative steps can be challenging, and we would be happy to assist in clarifying any remaining concerns.

Please feel free to reach out to our office, and we will do our best to provide you with additional direction on obtaining the birth certificate. We value your trust and appreciate the opportunity to address your concerns.

Wishing you and your family all the best,

Patricia L. Brown

reviews.text: I have hired and worked with Farah Ahmad on my child support modification case. The video that they post about their firm they talk about having empathy which I yet to see. I have paid close to $20k and still haven’t gotten any child support on my case that was approved 7 months ago! I have requested my attorney for some order which she denied adding to my case stating “oh that’s not possible in Texas and that’s not how things are done here” I had my case prep in another state which was handled much better and professional. If you are looking to pay lots of money, have an attorney who calls you back while she is eating or late or in the evening then this is the firm for you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Reyhaneh,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While we wish all our clients were satisfied with our service, we certainly understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for any shortcomings you experienced during and after your case. We strive to provide compassionate and effective legal representation to all our clients. We value your feedback and will use it to improve our services.

Regarding your specific concerns:
We clearly understand your completely reasonable concern about obtaining timely child support. There are two phases to achieving that. First, to obtain favorable judgments from the court. Secondly, once you have a judgment from the court, to actually receive that support in a timely manner. Without going into any details of your case on this public forum in order to protect your confidential information, we believe that we performed every action necessary to obtain a very favorable judgment from the court in a timely and effective way, and did indeed obtain a ruling that was in accordance with your legal and financial objectives. We also completed the appropriate post-trial paperwork. This was the work for which you hired our firm, and we believe you were satisfied with this outcome. Once this work was done, our contract with you was completed.

It appears that your dissatisfaction results primarily from issues that have arisen after our work performed on your behalf was completed. We are no longer involved in this pursuit since you asked for direct contact with the office of the Attorney General. If you wish to re-engage us in this pursuit, please let us know.

As regards our communications with you, we acknowledge that communication is crucial in attorney-client relationships. In most family law cases, clients are eager to keep advised of any new details or changes in their case. We feel we represent our clients 24/7 and may be guilty of calling on weekends or evenings, if called for. We apologize for disturbing your evening. We will address this concern with Farah to improve communication protocols and more closely monitor individual client preferences in that regard.

Sincerely,

Patricia L. Brown

reviews.text:
As a father of one 17 years old boy and 15 years old girl, I wanted to get the custody of my children. You can image how hard it would be. First it was hard to find an attorney who would like to represent the case. Even if I found, they might just try to get more rights instead to get the custody. Thirdly, it would be very hard to win for my case. However, I found Patricia, who, represented me, tried to get what I pursued and won.
Patricia is an excellent attorney. When I first met her, she quickly caught the key points and understood what I pursued. She focused on clients’ need and was willing to try for me. After I interviewed 7 attorneys, I immediately hired her.
Patricia explained me all the procedures. She provided the guidelines for me to prepare the testimony.  She focused on material facts and nature.  She worked hard. Sometimes we had the conference call during the weekend.
Paula, the paralegal, is also very professional. She read all the documents I prepared. She read my Final Decree of Divorce and found the more violations of my ex, which I did not know before. And she acted quickly and efficiently and always answer my questions timely.
The fee is reasonable and may be saving.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Mr. Xiang, thank you so much for taking the time to comment both Patricia and Paula to help you secure custody of your children. We know how busy lives are these days.  And, yes, conference calls, etc. are often necessary as challenging family law issues don't take the weekend off. Thank you again, sir.

reviews.text: I retained Patricia and her team to get me through my divorce that had issues with child custody and substance abuse issues.  They were able to guide me through the entire divorce process and I ended up coming out the other side with exactly what I was seeking. They were professional and good communicators and I'd recommend them for divorce proceedings to anyone.

reviews.text:
To say my case was a challenging one would be an enormous understatement.  Of all the child custody cases filed in the United States each year, one of the narrowest categories of victory in court is "father winning custody of special needs child from biological mother".  Patricia explained what needed to be done, laid out a plan of action, and coached /educated me every step of the way.  We won.  It wasn't easy, just like she said it wouldn't be...but in the end, my son will stay in the only home he's really ever known, most importantly, he'll stay with me.  Is Patricai Brown a good attorney?  Patricia Brown has become my good friend, who also happens to be the best attorney I've ever met.

My highest, 5-Star recommendation to Patricia, Paula and the entire staff at Patricia Brown & Associates.  You will not be disappointed in the results, and maybe equally as important...you will really like your attorney.

-Steve Fohl

Edited update after owner reply
Yes I had reached out to the Patricia Brown law office and many others regarding getting a CUSTODY modification order drafted, not divorce (don't even know what you are charging me for.) Upon discussing with Julia via email she had stated this

Nowhere does it state; starting at, estimated to be, or about $500.. literally said we will charge $500 for drafting this order.. thanks for trying to CYA..

reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry Mr. Walker was unhappy with our service. We view legitimate critiques as opportunities to improve client satisfaction.  In this situation, Mr. Walker and his spouse elected to do their own case before contacting us.  They appeared in front of Judge Betsy Lambeth in Williamson County who ordered the divorce. After this, Mr. Walker contacted us for the first time on February 7, requesting a cost estimate for drafting Judge Lambeth’s order. Having not seen the order, our paralegal replied drafting an order starts at $500 but ultimately depends on its complexity. She requested a copy of the court’s transcript. On March 2, Mr. Walker provided a copy of the transcript and, given its complexity, our paralegal told him it would be $1000.  With few exceptions, this is standard practice as no two family law situations are alike, and each must be individually assessed based on its unique complexity.  It is also noteworthy that at the end of the court transcript, Judge Lambeth said she would write the order and sent it to both parties! Finally, it is worth noting Mr. Walker never hired us and was not charged for our paralegal’s time.

reviews.text: Amazing attorneys! Extremely knowledgeable about every aspect of family law. They are never judgemental or make you feel as if they are not working in your best interest. They are so kind and helpful and go way above and beyond anything I ever expected.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your lovely review. We appreciate it, Ms. McWonky 😉

Dear Ms. Lanier,
Thank you for taking the time to leave such a nice commentary on Farah's efforts on your behalf. Relieving stress is one of our firm's critical goals, recognizing they anxiety divorce can cause. We wish you good luck and peace going forward.

reviews.text:
Made an appointment for today, upon arriving to the business park they are located in, I received a voicemail canceling the appointment for today. I noticed that the voicemail had only been recorded 30 minutes ago and asked to move to another time. So I got out of my car to walk in a reschedule, but the door was locked and no one was in the office, when I called to reschedule no one answered. My concern is that if this is how our business relationship starts, what can I expect of it in the future with something so important that I’m hiring a lawyer.

EDIT

Patricia contacted me regarding my experience and offered to make it up to me. She informed me that my appointment was an attempted to be rescheduled due to National Paralegal day, so her staff was out to lunch at the time and could not make it back to the office for my appointment.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Sattler had a legitimate complaint. Because of a scheduling snafu, we belatedly tried to reschedule his appointment. This complaint has been shared with all our staff to help insure it does not reoccur. We apologized to Mr. Sattler and offered him a free consultation at his leisure. We are very sorry for this oversight.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are very sorry Ms. Pires was unhappy with our service.  My paralegal and I worked very hard to try to obtain the results she was seeking. As with many of our cases, we pursued a mediated resolution, thus avoiding the expense and stress of litigation. When a mediated agreement is reached, we always caution clients to be very sure they are satisfied with the agreement before they sign it. Once it is signed by both parties, it cannot be changed. After over 20 years experience and more than a thousand divorce and family law clients, we have had some clients experience “buyers remorse” after signing such an agreement, so we take extraordinary pains to insure clients know what they are signing. Nevertheless, Ms. Pires was unhappy with the agreement and decided to hire another attorney to attempt to change it. We wish her all the best.
Thanks, Jeff. Five stars is 5 stars!!

reviews.ownerResponse:
It is hard to know where to start.

First of all and most importantly, Mr. Miller was NOT our client. He was the opposing party: our client was Mr. Miller’s ex-wife. We have requested Google remove this review simply because it is not from one of our clients, which violates Google's rules, and it lowers our average rating. However, read on:.

Secondly, as to the allegations made by Mr. Miller, Ms. Brown passed the Texas bar exam 22 years ago, in 1997, which anyone could see in her biography on our website. Not only did she pass the bar 22 years ago, but she has been Board Certified in Family Law by the Texas Board of Legal Specialization since 2016. Less than 1% of all the lawyers in Texas are Board Certified in Family Law.

Thirdly, here is the review left by our client, Mr. Miller’s ex-wife, Deborah Sant’anna on our Facebook page:

I used Miss Patricia Brown and Julia for my divorce degree and child support modification. I couldn’t be happier. My daughter got everything that she was entitled to. We were able to do that before even going to court. Miss Patricia delivered everything that she promised for the price that we agreed before hand. I highly recommend her services.

No wonder Mr. Miller is unhappy. He is not the first opposing party we have made unhappy and he will not be the last.

reviews.text: Patricia is an excellent attorney. After firing a horrible attorney, we interviewed Patricia and decided to hire her. Patricia is very caring and supportive, however she is also very intelligent and strategic. Her legal assistant Paula is also very good as well. She was able to implement very defensive moves and strategies with my daughter's ex-husband's ridiculous demands. We could not have gotten through this without her.
