reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry that our office was unable to take your case or even schedule an appointment with you due to confidentiality / ethical rules. As I explained when you asked for a consultation with our office, if we have had a consultation with one party to a divorce, even if they don’t hire our office, we are unable to represent the other party. It is an ethical rule that we must adhere to regarding confidentiality.

It’s unfortunate that you’ve decided to review our office even though we did not represent you. We didn’t even schedule an appointment because we were following the rules of our profession. But I understand your frustration.

We wish you the best going forward and hope you found an attorney that your spouse didn’t speak with before hand to represent you ethically in your matter.

reviews.text:
My divorce started about a year ago and I reached out to a local lawyer.  The things that still stand out to me, months since, are the following:

1. Coming to mediation unprepared. I had to re-email him important financial documents during the mediation.  He also disappeared to a black screen repeatedly and returned late for the mediator.
2. Ignoring or misremembering terms I had discussed with him in multiple previous conversations, and failing to bring them up as my representative.
3. Mentioning that women, specifically ex-spouses of other clients, can be "petty"
4. Failing to notice terms written by the other party which were clearly favoring the other party with no benefit to the child.
5. A remarkable lack of understanding of why a parent wishes to spend more time with their child.
6. Lack of an initial interview, failure to proactively reach out with information and updates, and inaccurately referring to some delays as the responsibility of the other party.

I offered an exit interview but received no response. No money was left in my trust to be returned, and I was left believing I spent thousands on a lawyer who did not care about me as a client and as a fellow parent.

I hired a lawyer because I could not do this alone.  I am not unintelligent, but reacting to an unexpected divorce, with a young toddler who was still nursing, and going back to school, means I was neither emotionally nor mentally prepared.  The correct decision for someone like me is to seek professional help and have one's interest be represented, with common sense towards the welfare and happiness of the child.

I do not recommend this law firm to help anyone else with those goals.

NOTE: No, I don't wish to further discuss anything with this law firm.  I had offered an exit interview when it counted.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry you felt you could not discuss these issues with our Firm, and were unhappy with the terms that you and the opposing party negotiated and agreed to in your Mediation. I would like to address your points below:

Mediation is a voluntary process. It is an informal meeting with parties and their attorneys where a neutral third party attempts to assist the parties in reaching a fully negotiated agreement. A party does not have to agree to terms at a mediation unless they are satisfied with those terms. They are free to end the mediation at anytime should they feel uncomfortable. Especially virtual mediations as you can simply leave the Zoom / Teams meeting.

1. During mediations, it is routine to ask a client for an updated financial statement or document as we need amounts that are correct as of that date. They are normally requested during mediation by opposing counsel so they may be fully informed during the negotiation. In virtual mediations we do need to excuse ourselves at certain times just as you would in an in-person mediation (bathroom breaks / lunch, etc.), but we always inform the client and mediator and the mediator has direct access to the attorney via text.

2. If at anytime you felt your interests were not being represented within a mediation, you could have addressed this with your attorney. We always make copious notes when we speak to clients. Those notes are stored in your file so all of our staff can be aware of the client's needs and be informed with speaking with the client. However, a client must let us know if they feel they aren't being heard or misunderstood so we can correct this.

3. I am sorry if you understood any of our attorneys to speak of women in this way. I can guarantee you, as a woman and owner of the business, we do not tolerate disrespect of anyone in our office including opposing parties.

4. Within a mediation a mediator or attorney drafts an agreement that is then sent to all attorneys and their clients for review. All parties review the agreement before they sign it. No agreement is signed without ALL attorneys and parties agreeing on all terms.

5. As all attorneys in our office are parents we know how important that relationship is. We work fiercely to represent parents' rights. We represent parents in all matters including CPS, custody, adoption, etc. and the majority of our reviews reflect our diligent representation.

6. We do not let client's retain our office without an extensive free initial consultation. There is no way to retain our firm without first speaking with the attorney that will be representing you as we need to make sure our Firm is a proper fit. We reach out to our clients only when we hav pertinent information as we do not want to overbill our clients by just checking in.

Finally, we have an extensive closing process in our office for all clients. We ensure all documents have been shared, billing history shared and retainer reconciled. You were sent a Closing Letter which you signed. It specifically requested feedback "Thank you for allowing us to represent you in the above-mentioned matter. We hope you have
been pleased with our representation, and we invite any comments, good or critical, that would assist us in our representation of future clients."

We take our profession very seriously and work to represent our clients around the clock. Again, I am sorry you did not feel you could address these matters with our Firm at the time of your representation, but we wish you and your family the best going forward.

Carl represented a great friend during her divorce. He set an affordable retainer compared to other attorneys and helped her navigate a very complex custody battle and monetary settlement. I’m thankful she had Carl to represent her interests.

Mrs. Knickerbocker is a great lawyer! Very driven to do right by you and represent you  , ive also heard so many good  things from others  that where represented  by him, his passionate and I great and keeping in communication  with his clients , I feel very fortunate  that  his taking care of a case thats very very  important  to me , thank you Mr. Knickerboker for your representation, I will be referring you to all my people  😊

Carl is amazing! He really understands how messy and complicated high-conflict custody and divorce cases can get. Super knowledgeable about narcissism and how it plays into family law. You can tell he genuinely knows what he’s doing and cares about his clients. Highly recommend giving Carl a shot — he’s the real deal.

Carl Knickerbocker was the best!! Amanda his side kick was always always there!! If you Email her she'd respond within 10- 30 minutes tops. They got the Job done after two more than fair settlement"s. Two Car wrecks and they walked me through every thing. I never felt alone or forgotten. They were always there. I'm very grateful to Carl and Amanda GREAT TEAM!!

As I was facing my complicated divorce, I took a long while to research and find legal representation. When I found Carl Knickerbocker, I immediately knew he was the perfect lawyer, from the first initial conversation all the way through to the final decree. I had a million questions, and he answered them all. His communication is thorough, transparent, and immediate. I felt completely taken care of in the craziness of my complex case. His exceptional expertise and strategic mindset made me feel at ease at every step. His fees are absolutely fair. I highly recommend Carl. He’s the best! Check out his incredibly helpful podcast on his website.
Amazing lawyer! He helped one of my dearest friends through a very difficulty divorce and ensured that her needs and her families needs were prioritized. 1000% recommend!
"He is an excellent lawyer, and I highly recommend him for his assistance with my friend Carolyn."

Exceptional divorce lawyer! Carl displayed unparalleled expertise and sensitivity from the initial consultation to the final settlement. Carl ensured my rights were protected. Communication was stellar; prompt responses and clear explanations kept me informed and reassured. Carl's strategic approach led to a favorable outcome, and his empathy made the challenging experience more bearable. His retaining fee was affordable, and billing was transparent. I highly recommend this lawyer for anyone navigating the complex terrain of divorce. Carl's professionalism and commitment to client satisfaction make him an excellent choice of representation.

It’s hard for me to verbalize just how profound of an impact choosing Carl to represent me during my custody case made on my life. For anyone dealing with a high conflict ex-partner, I highly highly recommend him. Carl’s expertise and understanding of the dynamics that play out in court when the other party refused to give up control, saved me years of suffering and strife. His work, not only as an attorney, but as an advocate for reform in the family legal system is a breath of fresh air. Carl, my family and I are eternally grateful for everything you did for us. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Carl truly helped my friend during her divorce. He was available and very responsive. Him and his team provided great representation and ensured all her rights were protected.
My friend used Knickerbocker for her divorce. I would highly recommend him due to how he was able to support her. 5 STARS!!!
Carl helped my friend during a tough time. He was very patient in supporting my friend through the divorce process.

This is the BEST Lawyer in all of Texas hands down.  The retainer was affordable compared to other attorneys.  He genuinely cares about his clients, and doesn't put up with nonsense from the other party in the court.  He was always available when I needed to reach out to him, answered all my questions within 24-48 hours.  He deals with contentious and noncontentious Divorces. He made my Divorce and Custody case a lot less stressful, because I could depend on him.  The best part is that I don't have to worry about my kids safety anymore because the legal paperwork specifies that they live with me, and I choose where we move going forward.  I don't have to worry about my ex showing up at uncalled for hours and days, because the legal paperwork states specific days and times.  I don't have to worry about arguing and fighting because we now have to legally communicate on Our Family Wizard, an app where all the crazy conversations can legally be documented.  Just pay for the retainer, every dollar you spend will be worth the peace of mind that comes with having Carl Knickerbocker as your lawyer.

I will never be able to recommend Carl enough. He is simply unmatched in humanity and depth of skill set. He is  *THE* resource for all things custody and high conflict related. He has the kind of strength and ability to navigate the murkiest of waters that only comes from walking through them yourself. He is some mixture of viper handler, elite strategist & the counselor that gets it more than anyone else you have spoken to. Just hire him.

I used Mr. Knickerbocker’s firm for my recent divorce and child custody/support case that was finalized this May. I appreciated that his consult was a video appointment because I was a new single mom with no vehicle at that time to personally meet him. His consult was thorough and answered all my questions with great patience. He was incredibly professional at court before the judge presiding over my case (I’ve seen other attorneys who were not organized or prepared). I sincerely appreciated Mr. Knickerbocker’s help when I needed it the most as I was leaving a very toxic/abusive situation. Just have patience and understanding that he’s only one attorney and the legal stuff is a lengthy process. I highly recommend.

My friend was represented by him, and (in all the years of her contentious divorce) I have never seen her feel so confident going into or coming out of her court date, because of his exceeding competence at defending her and presenting her case. She has super high standards, so hearing what she shared about his knowledge and skill at handling the case was super impressive to me. I would HIGHLY recommend him.

I had no idea where to turn when I needed an attorney. After googling and reading reviews, I chose to go with Carl Knickerbocker. I am so glad I did. He is very knowledgeable and has a very calming demeanor. He presented facts in my case that ended in a summary judgement in my favor. I highly recommend Carl if you’re needing an attorney.

He was very informative and helpful.
I was in what felt like a hopeless situation regarding child custody with my abusive ex husband. But thankfully Carl helped me nip all of the court bs in the bud.
Thanks again Carl!

I found Mr. Knickerbocker after working with another attorney for 9 months on a child custody case. In that time, I was given the run around and dragged along so much to where my previous lawyer suggested to get someone else. I was made to believe that I still had a long uphill battle due to the uncooperative and unreasonable nature of the opposing side. With my hope dwindling, I was blessed to have found Mr. Knickerbocker and his office- who were really kind and helpful and reassuring to me that he understood where I was coming from and what I was going through. He took on my high-conflict case with no hesitation and full confidence, even with me being 6 hours away from the court. He helped give me back my sense of identity that I was just a parent wanting to be in their child’s life, rather than the bad guy that I was treated like by the opposing side beforehand, which he reassured me that treatment had no standing. He truly listened to me and worked with me. He hit the ground running and went to battle for me and was able to resolve my case in 4 months. He actually held the other side accountable and stopped them from dragging their feet. With Mr. Knickerbocker on my side, he pulled back the curtains on this supposed mountain of a case. And come to find out what seemed like a volcano ready to erupt was no more than a science project paper volcano spewing false fire. He revealed the charade of the opposing party, simplified my case, and got it resolved. I would highly recommend Mr. Knickerbocker to anyone needing help with child custody litigation in the Austin area.
Very quick response. Straight forward and provided a lot of information all within our free consultation. I appreciation his honesty and his direction on our next steps.
We couldn't be happier with the experience and recommend Mr. Knickerbocker to everyone.

reviews.text: It was a pleasure to work with Rainey & Rainey at the Georgetown office. They listened to what I needed and were able to make some updates on my legal documents which has provided me peace of mind. They were prompt in keeping appointment times and efficient in getting my requests completed.
What a wonderful group of people!  Very professional and efficient and so kind to my 88 year old Mom and myself.
Chris Freyder and Staff were very professional and patient. Very easy to work with, great job! Dave and Pat.

I needed to get some legal documents for my mother who’s in a nursing home. Rainey & Rainey helped me. Attorney Chris Freyder handled it quickly and efficiently. He explained everything and extended help if I needed anything else. I will definitely use this law firm again

We chose Rainey & Rainey because of their high google reviews. The attorney Chris Freyder worked with me and my spouse. Chris is patient and caring and understood what we wanted. He's a down to earth person whos' friendly and easy to talk to. He explained things clearly and was understanding when we needed more discussion about specific details. After we signed our documents he asked if we had any questions. He answered several other questions and was genuinely interested. I recommend Rainey & Rainey for elder law services.

My wife and I used Rainey and Rainey to have our trust documents updated. We used Chris FREYDER and could not be more happy. He is so professional and made sure that everything was done exactly according to the way we wanted it. He is very knowledgeable of Texas law and I highly recommend anyone who needs trust services or state planning services to use this company.

Chris F is a true professional and helped us style three major trusts and grandchildren trusts in addition to our Wills and Advanced Directives to healthcare providers. He incorporated ideas we had never considered and raised issues that might have caused problems with probate and taxation. We are so grateful and while he is younger, he is brilliant and captures quickly and accurately our intentions in giving. If you need a review or new documents, Rainey and Rainey in Georgetown is wonderful to work with and worth the wait! There’s a reason you might need to wait a month for your appointment-that becomes crystal clear when you meet!
Great service and excellent legal resource.
I found the law firm of Rainey & Rainey to be extremely professional, knowledgable and friendly. I am very satisfied with the work done for me here and highly recommend their services.

Needing trust, wills, powers of attorney, and other documents either to be updated or written, we worked with attorney Chris Freyder at the Georgetown office and legal assistant Emilee Garner. Chris, with patience and understanding, explained what needed to be done, and why. Emilee assisted capably and ensured that the process moved along smoothly. Payment for services was more than fair. We are confident that the professionalism and friendliness we encountered with everyone we met at Rainey and Rainey is natural for the entire firm. We strongly recommend them for help with any aspect of elder law and estate planning.

The staff at Rainey & Rainey are very friendly and professional.  Attorney Chris Freyder was such a pleasure to work with assisting us setting up our Trust. He is very knowledgeable, professional and easy to  work with.
I highly recommend using Rainey & Rainey firm for all your Trust needs.
Great help when figuring how best to protect assets and planning for retirement. Timely response to concerns and questions and put my family at ease with entire process.

My husband and I had an excellent experience with Rainey and Rainey. If you need any attorney services, who specialize in elder affairs, contact their attorney office for your needs! Sarah and Emilee are awesome, and you will not be disappointed!

James and his staff are very professional and knowledgeable in what they do, esp. in estate planning with special needs.  They are very prompt and thorough in responding to questions. Delightful to work with. Highly recommending them.

We moved to Georgetown in 2022 and needed to update our California trust. James Rainey and his staff were able to efficiently make the changes we needed in a reasonable amount of time. They were friendly and knowledgeable and we appreciated their Texas hospitality. Thank you James and staff! Well done! We would recommend them to anyone who needs a trust.
Excellent attorneys. They are patient and take the time to listen and answer questions. They made me feel very comfortable.
Very nice throughout the process.  All my questions were answered.  Joe Greer was super easy to work with.

We are extremely pleased with Rainey and Rainey.  We needed to update our estate plan and Joseph Greer provided very helpful input as well as improvements to our documents. We are so glad we visited Rainey and Rainey and highly recommend Joseph Greer for estate planning needs.
Very professional, and listened to our needs. Our team created our Will to our specifications and advised us well. We feel confident in Rainey & Rainey.

Joseph Greer was exceptional in advising me and my husband in updating our trusts and changing our trusts and Durable POAs. Joseph was thoughtful and helpful toward my husband who has late stage Parkinson’s.  Also we simply enjoyed his conversation and good cheer.  We will share his name with friends. Judy Mayo
Met with James and Joseph today for the first time.  They were very patient with us. Very knowledgeable and easy to talk to.  Look forward to working with them.

Thanks again to Ms. Sarah Kendrick and Ms. Robbye Kelly!

As an IT engineer who worked for a large law firm in Chicago, I have very high standards for professional services.
When I ran into a legal issue in the Austin area, I couldn't rely on my Chicago network because I needed a local expert.
I vetted over 20+ different firms and lawyers in Austin, but most responses were unprofessional or lacked depth.
That changed when I found the Law Office of Dennis Hunsberger. Their strategic thinking and "legal brains" are top-tier.
These guys are absolute professionals who handle their work with the precision of kings.
If you want the best possible strategy for your case, I highly recommend this team.
P.S
Special Thanks, Mr Jack Foley

The Law Office of Dennis Hunsberger PLLC delivers the kind of representation people hope they’ll find but rarely do. From the first conversation, Dennis brought clarity, strategy, and genuine commitment to my situation. He doesn’t just “handle a case” — he owns it, anticipates problems before they surface, and communicates in a direct, respectful, and highly competent way.

What impressed me most was his ability to break down complicated legal issues into actionable steps. Every question was answered, every concern was addressed, and every document was prepared with precision. Dennis works with a level of integrity and intellect that inspires confidence from day one. You feel like you have a real advocate — someone who actually fights for you, not just processes paperwork.

If you need an attorney who is smart, steady, strategic, and sincerely invested in the outcome, this is the firm you want in your corner. Five stars genuinely isn’t enough.
Dennis Hunsberger is very knowledgeable and helped me throughout with my citation

Worth every penny... I've had three lawyers in the last five and a half years, Mr. Hunsberger being my last. *NONE* compare to the dedication and results from Mr. Hunsberger and his firm. After retaining his services, he had done more in six months than either of my previous lawyers had done in years. If his abilities in family law have even a sliver of insight to his abilities in criminal defense and personal injury law, you should absolutely retain his services regardless of the area you need legal counsel... And if I may say so myself, family law is a whole lot harder; as it most often reverts to a "mud slinging contest," but Mr. Hunsberger understood my goal was to rise above that, and he helped me and my family obtain a ruling that was more than we could have asked for.

Left a message and submitted a contact form seeking counsel, and nobody got back to me.  Had to call again and they said he’s not taking anymore cases right now.  Docking 1 star for the poor communication.

Mr. Hunsberger is a top tier attorney without the top tier cost. In my experience he was an absolutely outstanding defense attorney. He answered all my questions promptly and with thorough explanation. He also worked diligently with the prosecutor to have my charges reduced. To show my gratitude I bought him a bottle of wine. I specifically got him Amici, which is Latin for "friend of the court;" and he most certainly is.
Amazing firm
Professional litigation outfit that delivers with an Old World class tempered and steeled with cutting edge tech savvy execution.
Terrible service. Hire someone else.

Keeps his word and is one of the best to represent you not just post your bail.
He is high class.
Thank you Dennis!

Mr. Hunsberger is definitely one of the best attorneys I have had the pleasure of working with. Him and his staff have always treated me with the upmost respect. He truly cares for his clients. I have the greatest respect for his law firm. I can’t thank you enough Mr. Hunsberger for the amazing work you did. I’m truly grateful.
On point, supportive and helpful
A great person an hell of a gud lawer
Great lawyer treats his clients with the utmost respect, when you call, he answers, very dependable, he will not lie to you. Very much worth your money

He is an excellent attorney he has helped my husband Michael with his issues and continues to stand by our side through thick and thin!
I would recommend him to anyone!
Thanks for all your help and I hope to continue with your loyalty!

When they say attorney's don't care, they clearly never worked with Dan (Attorney Gattis), and Marilyn!   It is clear that Attorney Gattis has built his law firm hard work and integrity. Marilyn is compassionate, knowledgeable, and unstoppable.  They make a great team.  The two of them worked extremely hard for us with great results!

A year and a half ago, I was in an accident and I was at a loss on what to do and where to go to proceed. I was encouraged to reach out to Gattis Law Firm through a few friends from Celebration church. Marilyn Tibbit came to my rescue and put me at ease the moment she said, “focus on healing and I’ll take care of the rest”. I knew right then and there I was in good hands.

Marilyn worked with me, kept me accountable, and checked constantly on my health and the procedures of what to do next.

At the end of everything, I sat with Marilyn and Dan Gattis to close my case and I felt their tender care for me as I was one of their own family members (and they assure me I am to this day, “Don’t be a stranger”). This whole process has been a challenge, but Gattis Law Firm was with me holding my hand every step of the way – and I couldn’t imagine anyone else I would have invited to do this for me.

I honestly can’t thank you enough for all that you have done/provided for me. Ya’ll truly exemplify servanthood, honesty, integrity, truth, and above all else, you are for me.

Gattis Law Firm treated me like family.  They were dedicated and compassionate and ensured my case was handled in a timely manor.  I would not hesitate to recommend Gattis Law Firm, not only professional but they are caring , honest and personable.  They maintain high standards for their quality of work.

L Stude
My experience with Gattis Law Firm has been nothing but excellent. Dan is an experienced attorney who fights on the side of justice. If you're looking for someone with integrity, look no further!

I wanted to take a moment to comment on the services rendered by Mr. Gattis and his staff, Marilyn in particular. It is far more frequent that people post negative reviews than take the time to post a review when things go right...or very well. I want to say that Marilyn went above and beyond in my case. She was diligent, timely, thorough, and persistent. She kept me informed and abreast of developments in real time. She is a wonderful, honest, and caring person who made my case managable when I felt it wasn't. Mr. Gattis was everything I needed when I needed it. Given the sometimes sensitive and personal nature of issues that we needed to discuss, Mr. Gattis was respectful, sensitive, professional, and courteous. He counselled in a way that allowed me to feel comfortable and confident. Mr. Gattis is ultimately concerned about his client(s) and doing what he needs to ensure that his clients are treated fairly-which in my case meant putting me before himself. I cannot express how thankful I am for the inital referral to Mr. Gattis and his team, and for the way they resolved my case. This firm was professional, client focused, and persistent with a staff of caring and invested individuals-exactly what every legal team should be!

Professional trustworthy team that cared about me needs and got the job done!

Dan is a great lawyer and I respect him and have hired him on a personal matter.  My mediation firm, Mediators of Texas, is behind him all the way.

Dario is now fighting to assure the misdemeanor charges are dismissed as well. Priding myself on being a pillar of the community, a survivor of Myocarditis, and a child of God; I'm sure Officer Cantu just made a terrible mistake and is apologetic for his actions. Thank you again Mr. Bargas for your hard work and efforts in my case. God bless you and your firm. Lydia Gonzalez Villarreal

I cannot recommend this firm enough. I recently needed legal representation for a civil case and worked with Mr. Ilionsky, and the experience exceeded every expectation I had.

From start to finish, he was incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and responsive. He clearly knew exactly what he was doing and guided me through the entire process with confidence and clarity. What could have been a stressful and overwhelming situation ended up being smooth and manageable because of his expertise.

He saved my husband and I an incredible amount of time, energy, and money, and always made himself available to answer questions and provide updates. I truly felt supported and well-represented every step of the way.

If you are looking for a civil attorney (or an attorney in general), who is prompt, skilled, and genuinely committed to helping their clients, I highly recommend The Ilionsky Law Firm. I will absolutely be referring friends, family, and anyone in need of legal services to them in the future.

Thank you again for such outstanding representation!

After a long search for the right attorney, and after wasting nearly a year with a previous lawyer who didn’t move my case forward, I found EZ. From our very first phone call, I knew things were different. He returned my voicemail right away and took the time to really listen to my situation.

At the time, I hadn’t seen my three-year-old daughter in over a year after she was moved out of state. I was just trying to get visitation and reconnect with her. EZ was clear, honest, and confident about what we could do. He immediately got the ball rolling and fixed issues left behind by my previous attorney.

The difference was night and day. EZ kept me in the loop, prepared me for court, and truly fought for me. Despite constant pushback, he stayed steady and got us into court quickly. Because of his work, I was granted step-up visitation, then unsupervised time, and eventually we reached mediation where I was awarded a Standard Possession Order.

He even helped prevent retroactive child support that they were aggressively pursuing. More than anything, though, I felt like he genuinely cared about me being a father and rebuilding my relationship with my daughter.

Every case is different, but in mine, I truly couldn’t have asked for a better attorney. Thanks to EZ, I’m now preparing to have my daughter spend her first full week with me in Texas for Spring Break…something I wasn’t sure would ever happen.

I’m incredibly grateful.

5 Stars — Outstanding Legal Representation

Going through a divorce is already emotionally draining, so when my ex filed a frivolous lawsuit against me shortly after, I was shocked and overwhelmed. From our very first conversation, E.Z. immediately put my mind at ease. He walked me through the situation clearly, explaining that unfounded lawsuits do happen and that he would handle everything — and he absolutely delivered on that promise.

Throughout the process, E.Z. was patient, professional, and thorough. He has a remarkable ability to break down complex legal language into terms that are easy to understand, which made a stressful experience much more manageable. After two court appearances, the case was dismissed entirely.

I truly felt like I was in good hands every step of the way. If you’re looking for a civil attorney who genuinely cares about his clients and knows how to get results, I cannot recommend E.Z. highly enough.
"Easy" is an understatement. Lightning-fast, courteous support, effective guidance. A breeze to work with in every regard. Thanks so much!

Hands down the best legal experience I've ever had! Ilionsky Law, PLLC is incredible—they reply to messages and calls super promptly, explain everything clearly, and genuinely care about getting things right for you. Attorney Ilionsky and his team went above and beyond, treating me with respect and kindness during a tough time. Amazing firm—100% recommend!

I’m very grateful for the help I received from Ilionsky Law firm. After a frustrating experience earlier in my case, Ez stepped in and handled everything with professionalism, clarity, and efficiency. He was responsive, knowledgeable, and made sure I understood each step of the process. Most importantly, he took action and moved the case forward when I felt stuck. I finally felt supported and confident that my case was in good hands. I highly recommend Ilionsky Law firm to anyone looking for a reliable and competent attorney.

I hired E.Z. for a consultation several months ago. In a matter of less than an hour, he was able to give me precise clarity, knowledge, strategy around how to best approach my situation. He has been genuinely supportive and generous with his time, attention and follow-up even after our initial consultation.

E.Z. gave me the confidence and knowledge to get my matter resolved effectively and professionally. I could not be happier with the outcome! I would recommend Ilionksy Law to anyone in a heartbeat.

E.Z. IIionsky was fantastic to work with — very professional and responsive. I was in the process of moving out of state, and he handled everything smoothly. He got my case dismissed and helped me win, all without adding any extra stress during my transition. I truly appreciate his dedication and expertise, and I would absolutely use him again in the future. Highly recommend!

Thank you so much EZ! I don't have words to describe the extent to which you helped out & how well you kept me updated on all proceedings. I was already going through some difficult times personally & you kept that in mind & helped me keep my sanity & my money :). Any amount of saying thank you feels so little. E.Z. was very communicative! The process was fast and easy. Definitely recommend his office I wouldn’t hesitate to go back if needed.

E.Z. is very knowledgeable and very patient explains everything so you can understand the information in every document I received.
He is a five star attorney in every way, he does his homework and uses his experience to come up with the best plan of action along with your input. Highly recommend no matter the case.

I’m very happy with the professionalism and the integrity of every one at the office. The lawyer is very good and very knowledgeable about all the aspects of my case.

The gentleman I spoke with regarding sale of an LLC was very knowledgeable and helpful!  He provided all the information I needed to proceed, and I was extremely happy with the service he provided.   Highly recommend!

E.Z. is incredibly smart, precise, and his legal advice and representation are absolutely top of the line. He is very formal and professional, yet approachable. Overall, he has been amazing to work with, not only once but twice now, and I highly recommend him to anyone seeking expert legal counsel.

His pricing is fair, and he never overcharges, which is rare to find in an attorney. He’s also easy to contact and quick to respond, making the entire process smooth and stress-free. If you’re looking for an attorney who provides expert legal care with integrity, I can’t recommend him enough!

However, EZ responded and immediately shared his experience handling a similar case involving the retrieval of a dog. I’m beyond grateful for the outcome of my bench trial. EZ guided me through a difficult family law dispute, helping me secure the return of my family dog from my ex-girlfriend. His expertise was crucial in executing a writ of sequestration, and despite the court resetting the case multiple times—making the process mentally exhausting—EZ worked with me to collect evidence during this period to build up our case.

Winning this case meant everything to me and my family, and we are overjoyed to have our dog back from someone who wrongfully took him. I truly couldn’t have done it without EZ's expertise!

Thank you again, EZ, for everything!

reviews.text:
I don't know what I would've done without Mr. Ilionsky's help. My mother needed help probating my father's will when he passed in 2015, but English is her 2nd language, so I urgently needed to find a Russian speaking attorney. Ilionsky Law to the rescue! Mr. Ilionsky was incredibly kind, fast to respond, and was able to translate all the legal jargon to my mother (beyond my conversational fluency). My parents had a quirk in their will which made probate tricky. Mr. Ilionsky navigated these issues smoothly and successfully, and was able to resolve several particularly complex issues regarding a particular family member that had taken advantage of my parents.

The second time we retained Ilionsky Law was in early 2024 to assist my mother through a very difficult civil matter with said family member. He was courteous, astute and incredibly responsive throughout the entire protective order process, even taking a call with me when he was out of the country (still in disbelief to this day, but goes to show just how dedicated he is). Further, Mr. Ilionsky guided my mother and me through a subsequent criminal matter concerning this family member immediately after the civil matter resulting in a very successful outcome. What I appreciate most is that he was always upfront and honest and I never felt like I was on the receiving end of any BS.

I will forever be grateful for the grace, compassion and kindness he showed my elderly mother and his extreme patience in answering my (many) questions. His paralegal is incredibly responsive and professional and I never felt unseen or ignored during my communications with the firm. Being an attorney myself, I found his pricing to be really fair especially for the Austin area. I highly recommend Ilionsky Law if you find yourself in need of legal representation. Thank you, EZ!!

reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Camacho, I am sorry that you feel that way.  As you may recall, we were appointed at the end of September 2023, received discovery in late November, exchanged over 20 emails with you, some of which discussed the strengths and weaknesses of the case, and possible defenses.  I also know that you and Ellie had several phone calls, which she did her best to answer your questions, or when she could not, passed them along to me and I answered them via email.  Your first court date was not until January 17, 2024, at which time the state would make an offer.  Due to the nature of my practice, the holidays intruding during this time, along with having to quarantine because of Covid, we did our best to keep you advised of what was going on.  You decided to hire someone around January 12, 2024, and we signed the motion to substitute.  We do wish you the best in the resolution of this case.

reviews.text: Mr. Weire is the absolute best!! Rest assured you're in good hands with this man. Thank you so much for your help!

He’s been doing this MANY years and is very knowledgeable and has great relationships with the other court officials in Williamson county which is a huge bonus when he’s fighting your case. He is VERY reasonably priced, and very laid back about payment. He seems to be so laid back, and doesn’t worry. Which helped keep us calm while dealing with my husbands case. I hired Kathryn to assist with my case after receiving poor representation by a larger firm in Austin. I was hoping that despite the small size of her practice, she would be supportive, empathetic, and fierce in protecting me and my daughter. Sadly, she and many other lawyers are not properly educated in the fields of coercive control, post-separation abuse, stalking, and harassment. Regardless of the evidence I provided, she talked over me, interrupted me when I expressed concerns about my young child, and warned of loss of custody if I kept trying to protect my child from abuse. She would often make incredibly insensitive comments to me during phone calls and meetings. While I understand that the family court system is deeply flawed, if lawyers do not stand up for their clients, and keep convincing them to quiet their concerns for their children, the system will never improve. Abused, protective mothers need lawyers who listen. Sadly, Kathryn did not.

Ms. Fowler is a fantastic lawyer to work with. Her office always responds promptly to my questions and concerns.  I could tell she was actively on my case and ready for our next action.  Ms. Fowler is very knowledgeable in Texas Law.  I appreciate the effort she makes to explain to me all the legal talk I dont understand.  I have employed Ms. Fowler's law office more then once over the years and will continue to seek her counsel for future legal matters.

Kathryn was just the bulldog I needed to handle my messy divorce. She was able to assist in getting to a resolution and completing everything quickly. I would recommend her services to others. She is worth every dollar spent and if I have any other concerns in the future, I will be using her services.
I’m so very grateful for the help of Mrs Fowler and crew. I really felt like they had my back and was truly comfortable knowing they had my case.
Very knowledgeable and helpful
I have relied on Kathryn's legal counsel since 2010.  She never fails to provide excellent advice and fights for my rights when called into court.

This lawfirm is very unprofessional, they don't do what they're hired to do and then say there's no available attorneys to represent you the day you need them too. Take your money to a different lawyer
reviews.ownerResponse: I do not have a client named Julio. I have not had the fact scenario you described. We do not have more than one attorney. There are several Fowler law firms in Texas. I think you have the wrong attorney.

reviews.text: Amazing representation! Although there were challenging moments by others, Kathryn and Donna maintained great professionalism. I highly recommend their services. Thank you for doing such an amazing job! Kudos!!!

My situation went from bad to worse after going to court with Ms. Fowler. Nothing was achieved after being assured I had a strong case. I felt she lacked compassion and professionalism during our encounters and was more concerned about payment despite the lack of results and the outcome of my situation. I did not care for the rude conversations when completing the end of our business arrangement and would never recommend her to anyone.

Thank you so much in helping me, mid way thru my divorce til the end. Your hard work and patience is greatly appreciated. #A1Team

Karla Fleming

Ms. Kathryn Figueredo Fowler, Donna Harp and the team are very professional. I can say they are the best. Thanks for everything you made guys’ll in the interest of solve my legal issues from the beginning till the end.

In dealing with an internal family matter to provide care for a child shared between mother and remote guardian, Kathryn helped us to craft an order that created a very balanced end result. We are confident that if another family issue comes up that requires an even hand, that is impartial, Kathryn Fowler is where we will return.  Finally, her lead assistant, Donna really helped us through the process. Great team.

Kathyrn and Donna were very thorough and genuinely thoughtful while they took care of me.  Kathryn’s approach was brutally truthful and honest but real and protective.  She really was the best representative  for me during my separation process.  She not only offered legal advice but also personal care and concern.  I would hire her again in a heartbeat!  Thank you for giving me strength and courage!

Kathryn is the best family law attorney there is! She helped me with my child custody case a few years ago. She is very professional, experienced, "down to earth", and gives great advice. Kathryn and DeAnna (her assistant) are very quick to respond to messages and keep you well informed throughout the process. Kathryn even went above and beyond to fix an issue that arose in my case 2 years later. I would definitely recommend her for any of your family law/attorney needs.

I am so fortunate to have found Kathryn, she and Deanna have made my children and I a top priority from the beginning. I wanted to insure that everything was done right and my children would be taken care of after my divorce. Please listen to your attorneys, you hired them to look out for your best interest and Kathryn and Deanna did just that for me. The legal system is confusing to navigate without professional help. Every form was made clear to me and all options and outcomes were thoroughly explained so I would be prepared for future arrangements. I was able to put my feelings aside and make choices that best suited my family thanks to Kathryn’s direct approach. You ladies Rock!!! Thank You and Thank You again.

I am so glad I found Kathryn Figueredo Fowler. She was prompt and very professional and got me exactly what I was going for. I highly recommend her if you feel like you are going into a one sided battle against anybody.

I used Katherine for a 1 year long divorce and I would highly recommend her. She is very patient and actually cares for you and the case. Her assistant Deanna is also amazing - you are actually a person with them and not just money coming in. HIGHLY, HIGHLY recommend the both of them!

If I could give a Negative rating, I would! During my phone consultation (which I expected to be private), I soon realized I was on speaker phone, and I could clearly hear people talking in the background which was exposing my privacy.

I had asked a few questions for Fowler and told her a few things about my case. She began judging me right away. She was very abrupt, and she even mentioned of what she heard so far about my situation, she was rude in telling me to just to move to Texas (since I am living in another state) and why would I be stupid enough (And Yes, she called me Stupid!" to be living far away from my child. She continued to talk over me, and interrupt me while I was explaining my case. After hearing her being more judgmental and raising her voice, she then rudely hung up on me! (The circumstance of me living in another state, is that my ex is in the military and moves around).
I would NEVER recommend this individual. She is unprofessional, arrogant, and egotistic!
BEWARE, if you hire her, you would be wasting your time and your money!

My divorce took 2.5 years, I went through 4 lawyers before and was grateful that I found Ms. Fowler. She finalized the divorce for me in 2012 and I wish I went to her first.

Just last year my ex dragged me to court again because of some disagreement. We almost reached an agreement without court hearing but Ms. Fowler insisted on not agreeing with two of the requests. I do not know how she preps for court but she was professional, smart, asking point-blank questions and established that my ex had no case. She did so well in court that we won completely. My ex would have been better off if settled. I was so glad I followed her advise.

When it comes to lawyers, they are not all at the same level- I have a pile of expensive bills to prove it as I had hired and fired quite a few. In the end, Ms. Fowler is someone you can trust to fight a good fight for you, to give you the best advise for your situation and to follow through with a solution.

Thank you Ms. Fowler!

Wouldn’t recommend at all. Doesn’t itemize your statements properly or at all. Did not communicate well, and honestly took me for more money then she was worth. She told me I’d have to give money back to my child’s father if I didn’t move back to Texas. Felt she favored men over helping women. Don’t bother with her if you want true integrity.

Kathryn was able to see me quickly initially, gave me truthful and honest advice, and was compassionate during my divorce. She stood up for me when the divorce became difficult, and did not allow me to be intimidated by the other party. She went out of her way to help me with legal issues that came up as a result of my divorce as well as the divorce itself. I feel that she represented my interests well and was very pleasant to work with. If you are like me, and have had little to no prior experience with lawyers and aren’t sure who to trust, I would highly recommend Ms. Fowler. Her paralegal Ms. Cornelius is also very pleasant, and ensures that you know and understand everything that is going on. Overall I believe that I would use Ms. Fowler’s services again, and recommend her to anyone that desires a no nonsense, straightforward, and experienced attorney.

Kathryn handled my case very professionally and gave me very good advice.  Thanks to Kathryn I was able to overcome some tough legal challenges.  She was quick and very well prepared for my child custody fight.
Kathryn is an expert in her field and is very compassionate towards her clients. If you want someone who represents you a 100% she's the attorney you want!
Kathryn gets the job done, never doubt her.

Worked with Dan Izzo and had a really good experience. He and his team treated me right the whole way through. They were respectful, easy to reach, and took the time to answer my questions without making me feel rushed.
If you’re in Round Rock and need a lawyer, I’d definitely recommend Izzo & Associates.

I cannot recommend John Izzo & Associates PLC highly enough. From the very beginning, John demonstrated exceptional professionalism, integrity, and dedication to my case. He approaches every situation with a calm, strategic mindset and a deep understanding of the law, which immediately gave me confidence that I was in capable hands.

What truly sets John apart is his unwavering support for his clients. He genuinely cares about achieving the best possible outcome—not only for his clients, but especially for their children. Throughout the entire process, he remained attentive, responsive, and compassionate, ensuring that every decision was made with long-term stability and well-being in mind.

John is extremely knowledgeable and experienced, and it shows in the way he navigates complex legal matters with clarity and precision. He doesn’t back down when advocating for his clients and consistently works to secure the strongest possible results.

If you are looking for an attorney who combines professionalism, experience, and heartfelt dedication, John Izzo & Associates PLC is an outstanding choice.

John and Meredith helped me with my child custody case. Being the grandparent, It was a complicated one. John is a no nonsense shoot straight kind of guy. He and or Meredith where their to answer all my questions and helped me gather everything I needed for court. I got custody. Years later they were there when I needed them again, with good advice. I highly recommend This law firm!

John and his team did a great job keeping me informed and giving me the information straight.  They were incredibly honest with me about my case and what to expect.  It’s rare today to find people who truly want to help.  Thanks again!

John, Meredith, and the Izzo  team helped me navigate a very difficult custody situation  several years ago.  I am forever grateful to them for their compassion, support, professionalism, and expertise in helping me gain custodial custody of my son.  Even though I was a full time working father, I followed their guidance, and followed all the mandated guidelines and was rewarded.  I strongly recommend their team in dealing with any family legal matter that may come up!

I found the best Attorney to help me in my divorce. I was going through tough times, and John Izzo was my knight in shinning armor. He helped me with not only my case, but truly gave me the best advise on how to put family first and take care of myself. He was extremely professional and I was so amazed how fast he was able to get things done. EVEN DURING COVID!!! My kids and I are in a better place because Mr. Izzo and Ms. Meredith helped make it happen! 100% Customer Satisfaction !!! They are a great team to have in your corner.
God Bless this office! If you someone who can really help you in your time in need, CALL THIS OFFICE.

If me and my family are ever in need of their services again they will be the first law firm I'll call. Not once but twice, both times was the best experience. Thank you for everything you did for us.

Charged us $3k for doing nothing. They filed a petition on our behalf in the WRONG court. Had to get another lawyer to dismiss the case. John never contacted the opposing lawyer over the 3-4 month period, claiming that they were a cheap Rent-a-lawyer, which made the other lawyer mad thinking that we were stonewalling them. Had to spend a lot of money to undo the mess they put us in.

Hiring this firm was one of my biggest regrets. From the beginning, I was told I had a strong case — but I walked away with the exact same outcome I would have gotten without spending thousands of dollars. I worked with one attorney the entire time, but on my court date, a completely different attorney I had never met showed up.

I told them many times I couldn’t afford to pay the bills, (that was what his lawyers wanted me to do) but the only option I was given still left me paying for them — the exact same result I would have gotten anyway. I never felt like they had my best interest in mind. Instead, I felt rushed into decisions, pressured when I was already in financial crisis, and spoken to like I was stupid. John spoke to me with no respect, spoke over me, and as if he wasn’t on my side.

They made feel like a burden, like I was the problem, and like I was fighting them instead of the other side. I left this process feeling humiliated, broke, and completely unheard. I’m still married and spent thousands of dollars for TEMPORARY ORDERS!

If you are looking for a lawyer who will actually listen, explain your options, and fight for you when you are at your most vulnerable, I would strongly recommend going elsewhere.

Go somewhere else and get an attorney that isnt wasting your time and money, and might actually care enough to pay attention to your case. My gf recently used them and here's a list of things she experienced...
- Taking $1500 for an easy filing that shouldn't have taken that much time or money.
- Using almost $1k on interviewing a witness they didn't subpoena who didn't testify and still charging.
- Multiple phone calls charging by the minute only to ask the same questions either because they didn't prep themselves before or didn't remember.
- Interrupting the client during the calls and not letting the client explain the situation, leading to further confusion and their misunderstanding of facts.
- Misconstruing facts on a timeline after it was given to them in detail in order to prep for court.
- Handing off the case to multiple attorneys all the way up to the day of the trial where they show up with an attorney who knew absolutely nothing about the case and fumbled during negotiations. Had to call into other attorneys to ask questions in the front of the court room to find out whats going on.

These guys are clearly out for the money, don't care, and are not organized enough to be effective for someone in need of actual help because they will milk you extravagantly for every penny only to be ineffective assistance of counsel. My gf depleted her savings and 401k only to be unheard, charged, and brought to court with someone who knew nothing about her case. Bang up job.

Wasted a year and 6 grand plus dad's 2300 through another law firm they got help from. And had a issue with a house, ex wasn't paying and ruined my credit and they took almost a year to reword the decree for equity and when I stepped forward to share my thoughts with judge.  He said we'd be back and 2 days later,  they finished what they were doing. SMH. And still house is under my name ruining my credit.  And they had so many things in decree to go with that wasn't being done by EX

Atty Izzo and his staff is amazing. I started filing for divorce in 2018 and was officially divorced on June 16, 2021. When I first met with Atty Izzo I already knew by the first introduction that he was going to change my life. Communication was easy. Patience is key which I have a lot of. I just had a piece of mind because it was easy to get a hold of them for an update and Dahlia was amazing with keeping me posted. I still have to stop by the office to show them my appreciation in person and give a picture of my son and I which I plan on doing so soon! I'll forever be grateful!

These guys are the REAL DEAL!!!!
Dan is one hell of an attorney! He got my husband the best deal ever for our son. We get to finally be a family —enjoy holidays, full summers, & most importantly be there for all the growing moments together. ALSO, Dan, Meredith, & John pulled a rabbit out of their hat from 1K a month of child support to $200! That’s right, $200!!! That’s completely unheard of & legendary!!! Dan is the calmest, no matter what situation you’re in & in trial. John is amazing from intake to the end & extremely knowledgeable about everything. Meredith is amazing & fierce which was a perfect addition to our complex case. No matter how busy they get, they will ALWAYS get back to you instantly with a lot of information; they never waste anyone’s time. Dahlia is amazing & is on it from start to finish! If you need your attorneys she will keep you at ease & a great problem solver!
No matter how ugly & bumpy our journey was, these guys all stayed by our sides & did their job giving their 110% & I couldn’t be anymore grateful for each & every one of them. Dan & John are the man!!

Thank you Izzo & Associates for being the best & biggest blessing to our family!♥️

If I could give more stars I would! If you have second thoughts, don’t even think about it, or hurt no longer…just hire them!

John and Meredith has helped tremendously with Dahlia. Their team helped me with my divorce decree battle over the last three years. They have stood by my side and they were like second family to me. They are God send to me and my children.
I couldn’t find any words on how awesome they work my case. I am very grateful and blessed to have them fight for me. Thank you and my Family appreciate you.❤️🙏🏻
The only team that took the time to listen and was willing to help.

This firm is so amazing and dedicated to their clients. They made sure my child support case went smooth with no hassle at all. Thank you John and your team for the wonder service you provided for me.🤙🏾🖤

I gave a 2 star because eventually we got passed the custody phase for my neice so they deserved the courtesy of at least that. I was told to wait 6 months after custody was final and then we'd file for adoption.

At the 6 month mark, mind you I was very patient, I called, texted, emailed, and left voicemails for both John Izzo and Merideth Semler for months.

I waited days and sometimes weeks between contact attempts. Spoke to their assistant many times and was assured I'd receive a call. After wasting months I gave up and found new counsel. Shame on me for allowing such unprofessional business practices for so long.

A courtesy call, email, or SOMETHING would have been nice if they had become to busy for my case.

I sure hope you don't treat all of your clients this way. As a business owner myself I can't imagine doing this to someone. Especially in a case as sensitive as adoption.

Shame on me for allowing this to carry on so long but shame on you for your unprofessional and careless way of doing business.
Didn’t even get past consultation. John Izzo did not even allow me to speak and talked over me. As a business owner myself,  this is terrible customer service! Especially to a potential client!!

I cannot say enough wonderful things about John and his team. He was my second attorney that I hired for my divorce. They made me feel very important and put my mind at ease.I was going through a very uncomfortable nasty divorce, of course you feel very vulnerable and scared in these situations. John and Meredith really cared about me and my specific situation with custody of my daughter and my assets!  My first attorneys all they cared about was money, unfortunately like many other divorce attorneys. I ended up firing them and going with John and his team!!!! I’m so glad that I did.

John was amazing. He and his staff was there for me at all times during my custody case. He was professional and upfront about everything. I was always aware of what to expect.  John is a very "tell it as it is" kind of person. He is extremely passionate about what he does. I would recommend him to anyone!
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your feedback and review Cathy! Thanks again.

reviews.text: Izzo and his team and very genuine people. They're very tough, hard working, honest and will stick by you through the ups and downs. Highly recommend this firm.

This is definitely my go to legal help in Round Rock. They helped me set up my will and estate and did a fantastic job. Filing was a breeze. I have also referred other friends to them and they have helped immensely with their cases.

I was blown away by the kindness and understanding of Mr. Izzo. I had just called to get to know how much it will cost me to consult him. He was so generous that he literally gave me the next steps to take right away. I was moved by his generosity and commitment to the law that I will certainly be retaining him.

John, Meredith, and team are all true professionals...  We successfully modified a previous divorce decree giving me custody of my girls with exclusive rights!  Living in Williamson County I did not think it would be possible.  Thank you Izzo & Associates for saving my girls and making things right!!!  Give John a call today!

UTTERLY AMAZING. John Izzo and his team are nothing short of miracle workers. We had a complicated case requiring an emergency injunction for a child's safety, and every law firm we'd contacted was either giving us dates a week out (or more), or else turning down the case entirely because there was a possibility it could be transferred to a new jurisdiction once we began.

But John cares deeply about the well-being of children in these tough situations. He and his staff literally ran around the office assembling paperwork, got the forms filed, and we were in front of a judge that same day--just five hours after we walked in! Some of the timing was luck, but there is absolutely no way it would have happened without the truly herculean efforts of John, Meredith, Dahlia and Dan. I have never seen anyone care that much about meeting a deadline that didn't personally affect them, and I am profoundly grateful. If you want a lawyer who works his butt off and makes it happen against all odds, Izzo & Associates is the way to go.
reviews.ownerResponse: We thank you for your feedback and review Jennifer!

reviews.text: Professional, Passionate, and Persistent- three words I use to describe Izzo & Associates. John Izzo and Meredith Semler are an EXCELLENT team!!  I've known John for over three years as he was my divorce attorney in 2015, and we just wrapped up a final hearing in my custody battle. John is very inexpensive as I spent about a third of what my ex-husband did. John and Meredith worked countless hours preparing for the final hearing and their passion and persistence paid off as I won everything I asked for. John went up against two young attorneys and his experience and knowledge, along with my honesty, won our case.  I HIGHLY recommend Izzo & Associates if you're looking for a professional, passionate, and persistent attorney to handle your legal needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to leave a review for us Shellie! We appreciate your feedback and five start rating!
We appreciate your star rating!
Thank you for your star rating!

reviews.text: If you want to be 10,000 dollars in debt just for this law firm to show up to ONE court hearing then this is the law firm for you!

No show on the soon meeting. Apparently he was 50 minutes late to the meeting. They were so gracious to waive the no show fee that I was to be charged for leaving the meeting after waiting 45 minutes past the meeting time…..

I am pleased to acknowledge the help that I received from Ms. Sarah, today. Despite our situation being outside of their scope of work, she took the time to refer me out and at least we now have alternative options available to us. Thank you Sarah!

If you’re in need of help, advice, and simply just don’t know how to navigate or even simply where to begin. This law firm is where you need to start. From start to finish I can speak from experience that you will be shown what you need to see. Not only will they put every drop of effort into you and your case but they will also educate you on all of your rights and let you know when they are being abused. Do not take your situation for granted. Start off with the best and let the best finish it for you. You will NOT be disappointed.

Worst experience of my life. When I had the initial telephone consultation the person I talk to seem like he was knowing what he was talking about, even told me that the mother of my child was in Contempt of court. Hired them In October to get my simple standard possession. then gave me five different lawyers on my case the day before gave me a new lawyer, who had no idea about the details of the case. Then when we went to court, my lawyer said that me and the mother of my child were married and we never were added three more months of stipulations actually told me if I could get a certificate of graduation of the AA program. I paid $5000 and then they proceeded to ask me for an extra $2000 for doing nothing in my case. I asked them multiple times over the five month period. That I had them as my lawyer who was my lawyer. The portal that they ask you to use is not very user-friendly. The staff was awful anytime. I call up there. They would tell me to use the portal and I have told them that I did and they would never respond to me then had the audacity to ask me for another three grand for mediation when I told him that I couldn’t afford the extra two grand after the five they immediately sent me a motion to withdraw was the worst experience of my life and now have PTSD over finding a lawyer which my case is still open and had to represent myself prose during the mediation process they need to have their bar removed. Awful experience. Will tell anyone to run far far away from Brett Pritchard. I even asked to speak to Brett Pritchard multiple times and had appointments set up then when I was supposed to meet with him, he was never available and had some other lawyer talking to me about my case that knew nothing about It. Awful

I had a great experience working with this law firm. They handled my jurisdiction issue quickly and thoroughly. Their team was professional and knowledgeable. I truly appreciate their support and would highly recommend them to anyone dealing with legal troubles. They made a complicated situation much easier to navigate.
Thank you for your kindness and referral.

Top Quality Service:

Truly a great representative in guiding me through my experience that I had. I'm so grateful  to have their representation.
I came in for a consultation and Mr. Linick was very helpful. I ended up not needing the services but if I ever do he will be my first call.

This law firm, represents why people  cannot trust lawyers. As a mother, going through cancer, who finally gained the courage to leave the most controlling man then put all her money and faith into Mr. Pritchard's firm. I only spoke to of his colleagues twice for fifteen minutes, where I was yelled at while my soon to be ex-husband and father of my children was on his death bed in ICU for a month. During that month, my baby voice celebrated his birthday. During that month, I was there every day still for his dad. I was selfless and humble enough to put things aside for the greater good. This firm told me to shut up as I was rushing into the hospital rounds. Never listen to me. Took every dime I had when i was dealing with the death of why I had to leave the father of my children. The reason I separated from him is the reason he died. And this firm, I took a vow to protect my children and me and did not care. These men are not human. These men will make false promises and take vows to protect innocent children and do what's right. Yet not even hear your voice and care. Then continue to send you bills. When the person you were divorcing is dead from the reason you had to divorce him. That is sick and anyone who uses this firm.I truly wish you the best and pray for you.
Even though they could not help me with my situation they took the time to talk to me and look at other possibilities.
Thank you for your assistance today Sarah!

I would urge anyone looking for a Law firm to pleaseeee go here, very professional and its an understatement to say that they go above and beyond, the greatest Law office in the country in my opinion. i would not use anyone else.

Worst experience with a lawyer. Have had lower costing attorneys that have done much more. Communication was completely lacking. You're passed around to so many people and have to explain everything all over again. You have to do all of your communication through an app.. paid several thousand dollars and went to a court hearing represented by a lawyer from this firm, never even got any paperwork drafted up and sent to me, and now I'm no longer a client and they want me to pay again to go do the whole process over to get the paperwork. No thanks! No one seems to know what's going on and in a time of needing guidance and consistency, I didn't get either. Strongly recommend finding another attorney.

Couldn’t be more grateful for the Pritchard Law Firm. Everything was quick and easy and I felt at ease throughout my entire case knowing I was in good hands. Thank you to my paralegal Dallas for being so responsive & easy to work with!

The Law Office of Brett Pritchard handled my case with care and achieved the goal beyond my expectation! Thank you specifically to Jeff Linnick for winning my court case and to his paralegal, Dallas, for effectively communicating with me during this process. You all are awesome!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Glenn! We'll pass along the thanks to Jeff & Dallas!

reviews.text: I wouldn't recommend these guys to my worst enemy. The office creates a layer of attorneys so they can continue to bill you through the chain, burning through your retainer at ungodly speeds. The attorney I worked with (Tim Daniel) did not know anything about my case and made many promises on work that would get done, just to call me weeks later agreeing with my opponent. When I did find a new attorney to work with, Bretts office continued to bill me another $750 for work my NEW ATTORNEY had done - not them. In total it was a giant waste of money that led to little progress in my case.
Very professional firm! The staff was very friendly and helpful, and I always felt well informed through my case. I highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jannie! We're happy you were pleased with the firm as we've worked with you on legal matters.

reviews.text: Awesome lawyer I highly recommend Mr. Eric Torberson he will get the job done.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Ben.

reviews.text: Eric has been extremely helpful in navigating legal issues in Texas including animal law. He is very clear and professional. I would recommend him to anyone in the area that wants a sharp, professional and effective attorney who is also caring and empathetic. Thank you Eric for going above and beyond for us and our dogs
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Josh. Glad I could help.

reviews.text: I always seek The Best, so I definitely didn't want to hire one of those "Good Ole Boy" local defense attorneys, who goes fishing with the DA on the weekend, and have my fate compromised or decided on a lake. So I did a search for the top Defense Attorneys in Texas, and Mr. Torberson's name was in the top of all the lists, and as I read his profile and researched past cases, I was quite impressed with one case in particular. In June 2016, Mr. Torberson took on a case to represent and protect six dogs from being euthanized after attacking and killing a Process Server, who trespassed and ignored a "Beware Of Dogs " sign at a Manor, Texas residence. It was at that moment that I knew he was the man I wanted and needed to represent me and handle my defense; a man, who truly loves animals, as you will see, when you visit his office and meet his beautiful pets in person and in photos. My point? Well, a man dedicated to insuring an animal's right to proper representation and a fair trial will definitely fight just as hard and determined, if not harder, for a human.....and he did just that in my case. I have been in and out of the judicial system for many issues and have been represented by numerous attorneys; however, I can definitely say without an ounce of doubt that Eric Torberson is one of the Best. I could use an infinite number of positive adjectives to describe him and his approach to handling a case and the utilization of the law, but I will just leave it at this...You're a damn fool if you fail to hire this man for representation in any legal matter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Russell, that’s very kind.

reviews.text: I am so very grateful to have had Eric represent me. I was extremely anxious and he kept me informed every step of the way. My case was very serious and could have had very severe consequences. He spent alot of time on it and eventually got the complete case dismissed. If you want a great attorney, he's it... He also served our country as a proud Marine.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Margaret.

reviews.text: I researched attorneys very thoroughly and i knew Eric was the One when I read about him!  He worked his magic to get my finance's case dismissed!  (her 4th DWI)  We were very lucky to have had Eric.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you. My pleasure Leonard.

reviews.text: Eric Torberson is an excellent attorney. He is client focused, detail oriented, invested in the outcome of each case, and he gets the job done. Worth every penny.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Wendy that’s very kind!

reviews.text: Excellent attorney who will go the extra mile!

Mr. Torberson was an outstanding attorney on our case.  I highly recommend him.  Very knowledgeable and helpful when going through a court case.

Alissa Martin and J Jarmon
reviews.ownerResponse: Your welcomed!

reviews.text: Eric was very professional and encouraging throughout the process.  He encouraged me to have a positive attitude and that a positive outcome would happen. That's exactly how it worked out.  Very grateful for his help!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks. Love you and wish the best.

reviews.text: Words to describe Mr. Torberson - professional, polished, and effective. He was very helpful in my Wilco case.

I was scheduled for a dangerous dog hearing appeal and Eric delivered in very short notice. My dog bit someone on my property and is suing. We already went through a hearing that classified my dog as "dangerous". I appealed the ruling and consulted Mr Tolberson in the meantime. He was a rock star in court and the judge disagreed with the original hearing result. She said my dog is by no means dangerous and over turned the ruling....stating he was doing his job. We subsequently learned she’d also need to apply for Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) benefits. Both processes were lengthy, complex, arduous and required multiple levels of appeals to ultimately be awarded the benefits to which we believed she was rightfully entitled based on her adverse health developments. Fortunately, Greg Reed was just what we needed. Greg was kind, caring and encouraging, but also experienced with such complex cases, had a great ability to understand, remember(!) and convey her medical condition and associated jargon, as well as the legal minutiae necessary to ultimately prevail in our case. Greg’s accessibility, prompt, accurate and insightful communications, combined with his kind and patient demeanor made him a pleasure to work with. Greg also offered multiple payment options which enabled us to afford his quality representation. We believed her claim for disability benefits was warranted, but would certainly have been rejected if we didn’t have excellent legal representation. We couldn’t have done it without Greg Reed and the resources of Bemis, Roach and Reed! We have nothing but praise for our experience with Greg L. Reed - no complaints at all.
