reviews.text: I was reaching out to various law firms regarding an issue with my insurance policy. Another highly reputable firm responded quickly, and I was exploring my options while being transparent with everyone. However, once Bemis Roach and Reed Law Firm learned I was in contact with other firms, they completely stopped replying to my emails. When a firm shows they don’t value your business, take it as a sign. I strongly recommend choosing a more professional and dependable law firm, especially for those unfamiliar with the legal process who need trustworthy guidance. Bemis Roach and Reed failed to provide any explanations or information. I urge you to look elsewhere. Another firm promptly took on my case based solely on the details I shared, no hassle. Perhaps Bemis Roach and Reed stopped responding because they felt they couldn’t compete, but that’s no excuse for ghosting a potential client. Transparency is far more respectable.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Online reviews serve two purposes: They educate the public about whether the public may want to interact with the business. And they give the reviewed business constructive criticism so that the business can learn from the experience and improve its performance.

This review accomplishes neither. Dom does not provide any information other than he/she called "regarding an issue with my insurance policy." Bemis, Roach & Reed is a disability law firm. If a potential client calls with a question about health insurance, auto insurance, homeowner's insurance, etc., we politely explain that we do not practice in those areas and we refer the potential to more appropriate resources. There are any number of reasons the firm might not do more than offer a referral or have only an initial contact with a potential.

I entirely agree with Dom about transparency. Potential clients also need to be transparent. Dom assumes we stopped replying to emails because he/she disclosed that other firms were contacted. He/she is wrong. The firm started in 1993. I can assure you that we do not discontinue communication with potentials because they are interviewing other attorneys. You cannot stay in the legal business for more than 30 years by turning down clients with meritorious claims.

More likely, Dom has a legal issue outside of our practice area or has a claim that we viewed as not worth pursuing. We will never know given that he/she did not follow up with us or provide sufficient information in the review for us to investigate.

Some keyboard warriors just like to vent. I invite her/him to contact me to discuss the matter.


Greg Reed, Partner

reviews.text: DO NOT RECOMMEND AT ALL!!! The first problem was at intake. I was told I would get a response about my case within a couple of days, but I had to reach back out after a few weeks because I didn’t hear from anyone. I was dealing with one young lady, but when I called back I was pushed to someone else. It took them months to get back with me and I almost missed my chance for a hearing. Once they agreed to take me on as a client I was assigned a case manager Craig Roach, who was great and said I had a good case. Greg Reed was my attorney, but I was informed within a month before my hearing that he was unavailable on that date, even though the hearing date was sent out months ago, so I  was assigned a new attorney which was Daniel Messenger. He then preps me, only to tell me we will lose. Remind you they had my info for months and if my records weren’t sufficient enough then they had all that time to let me know, but he waited until the end to say I need to withdraw from having a hearing. He seemed more against me than for me. He didn’t even fight for me to get an outcome, he pretty much gave up on me! The first thing out of his mouth was we will likely withdraw ourselves from your case. My thing is you all had my info for months, so why wait until the end to turn me away! He then tells me I don’t see my doctors enough, seeing four doctors every three months was not enough. He acts like he didn’t understand that I couldn’t see my doctors for a year because I lost insurance and couldn’t afford to pay out of pocket, instead he kept telling me how I didn’t do enough to get an approval. It seems this law firm will take easy cases, but if it’s one they have to actually work hard for then they don’t want you. I will try again but I won’t be using this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am sorry Ms. Clark is disappointed with our representation. However, we rely on our clients to give us full and honest information about their health and work history. Information develops as the case moves forward. When we obtain new information that conflicts with what we were told, we give advice to our clients based on how the information affects the case. Sometimes the information learned is case ending. Yes, we recommended that Ms. Clark withdraw her claim.
Greg Reed

Worst attorney ever..lazy..lazy..lazy..run from him and hire someone who will help you...fired him and got a real attorney...I suggest you do the same..way better turn out

before bailing out, he promised me he would insist the prosecutor test what I was arrested for. I also insisted on watching body cam footage myself, as i was sure there was malfeasance on the part of the cedar park police. I then showed up to two court dates in 2020 that were postponed and he never informed me. So 9 months in I got a phone call from him saying that the evidence has been looked at and I could take 6 months jail or 4 years probation. Again, I insisted on looking at the body cam evidence. We tried looking at all of it 30 minutes before court, but he had a difficult time finding the disk drive in the file explorer, and instead was clicking on his granddaughter's questionably filmed gymnastics practices. I tried scheduling a time that would be convenient to come in the office to watch it, but he wouldn't respond until the day he was ready to meet. I had to drop everything I was doing to meet up. When we finally did, Mr. morgan did everything in his power to make sure I couldn't find out that a police officer turned off their body cam. When I was about 5 minutes away from discovering the very thing that would dismiss my case, he turned the laptop so I couldn't use it, stood over me as I sat, and started yelling at me, telling me I wasn't going to find anything and other discouraging things. After asking if he does this to everybody and suggesting he might be friends with the prosecutor, he told me to "get the f*ck out of my office" and "if you ever come back you'll be arrested for tresspassing." Luckily, my case was dismissed after asking the judge if it is legal to turn off their body camera, but no thanks to Mr. Morgan, as he rage-quit and I got another attorney. I wish i had recorded our interactions so I could report him to the TX bar association or something, because this man should not be practicing law...
reviews.ownerResponse: The real issue was that you accused me of working with the prosecutor to try to convict you.  That puts me in a really bad situation and after that occurred, I had to withdraw.   I'm glad your case was dismissed.

I sincerely hope others do not have to go through the experience I had with attorney Milissa Barrick at this firm. In my experience working with her, I did not feel adequately represented in court—documents and evidence I had provided that were key to my case were not presented because copies were not available at the hearing, and I even had to clarify information about my own case in front of the judge. I also observed the judge correcting statements made by Milissa Barrick multiple times, which was concerning to me as a client. After the hearing, I was told in a call by Milissa Barrick that the judgment was “just” and that I needed to “accept my mess ups,” which was very discouraging to hear from the attorney I had hired to advocate for me.In my experience, I often felt that my attorney was not fully advocating on my behalf and there were some SERIOUS trust issues.

I initially had a five thou trust, but within about two months the total charges exceeded over sixteen thousand. Despite requesting in writing that the firm withdraw from representing me after the hearing, I continued to be billed, which left me feeling trapped and frustrated. I chose this firm because they were among the least expensive options I found when calling around, but the costs ended up being similar to other firms. Based on my experience, I wish I had considered representing myself instead, as the outcome created significant challenges for me and my child that will take years to work through.

I can attest that other negative reviews I read reflect experiences similar to my own and I wish I had paid attention to them. My experience with this firm raised serious concerns about their billing and representation practices. I would not hire them again, and I strongly recommend carefully considering other options, asking around on social media, and exploring other firms before deciding. From my perspective, after being with nightmare of a firm, I realized that there were better options available out there as representation, I couldve even rehired one of my former lawyers. This was the worst experience of my life with the worst possible outcome.

Edit:It’s been 3 months since I had one of the worst experiences with this law office. My case has been closed for three months and I’m still seeing mystery charges on my account with no explanation. I’ve never experienced anything like this with a business. If the case is closed, why am I still being billed? I would strongly recommend not hiring them, it is frightening, you will feel trapped if you do.

reviews.text:
I’ve been working with Bryan Fagen’s law office for about four months now. Initially, I was optimistic, believing I had someone genuinely caring and committed to helping me. We had one meeting to discuss my issue. After about two months, they had drafted three different counter-petitions. The first one seemed reasonable, and I was okay with it. However, the second and third petitions were not disclosed to me. I had provided them with a USB drive containing all my text messages, receipts, and pay stubs.

A day before the hearing, I called my attorney, Melissa Barrick, to inquire about the information she would be presenting. She couldn’t provide a clear answer and seemed unaware of the details of my case. To make matters worse, she requested all the information I had provided months in advance, claiming the files were corrupted and needed to be re-uploaded.

On the day of the hearing, she presented incorrect information that I was unaware of, which severely compromised my case. To add insult to injury, she arrived in ripped pantyhose that she claimed were leggings, paired with a leopard print skirt that reached above her knees. It appeared as if she had just gotten out of bed.

While I don’t mind her attire, presentation is crucial, especially in a child custody/support case. Moreover, I was charged $11,000 for four months of minimal work. They charged me for emails that required only one-sentence responses and $275 for a 10-minute phone call for basic questions. Additionally, I was charged $950 to file papers.
reviews.ownerResponse: We sincerely apologize for your experience and appreciate your feedback. Your concerns regarding communication and case handling are taken seriously. Please contact our office directly so we can address this matter and work towards a resolution.

reviews.text: Teresa was extremely helpful for a car crash case I was involved in. She made sure I got exactly what I needed and wanted. She made the entire process so easy. She was also very kind and patient. I highly recommend her!

I had the pleasure of working with Teresa at Teresa Christian Law, and I couldn’t be more grateful for her support. She came highly recommended as someone who truly puts her clients first, and she absolutely lived up to that reputation.
While the process naturally took time, Teresa kept me informed every step of the way. Her communication was clear, timely, and reassuring—making sure I was always prepared for whatever came next.
What could have been a stressful and overwhelming experience turned out to be smoother than I ever imagined. Thanks to Teresa’s guidance and professionalism, it was surprisingly stress-free.
I wholeheartedly recommend Teresa to anyone in need of legal support. She’s not only knowledgeable and reliable, but also genuinely cares about her clients’ well-being.

I was involved in a serious hit-and-run accident in 2024, and working with Teresa Christanson was a game-changer. From the very first consultation, she took the time to fully understand the details of my case and immediately laid out a clear legal strategy. She was honest, thorough, and always made sure I knew what to expect at every stage of the process.

Teresa handled every aspect of my personal injury claim with precision—from collecting medical records and witness statements to negotiating directly with the insurance companies, who initially tried to lowball me. She refused to let them get away with it. Her legal knowledge, especially regarding personal injury and insurance law, was incredibly reassuring and clearly made a major difference in the outcome.

She’s the kind of attorney who doesn’t just settle to close a case—she fights for what’s fair and just, even if it means pushing harder and going longer. She was never too busy to answer questions, always kept me updated, and made sure I was fully informed before making any decisions.

Thanks to her relentless effort, I received a full and fair settlement that truly reflected what I went through—not just physically, but emotionally and financially. If you want a smart, experienced, and genuinely compassionate attorney who will go to bat for you and win—I can’t recommend Teresa Christanson enough.

My case was pretty tough to take on - had tough odds against me put in place by discriminating powerful authority figures. Even with an unbiased witness people were not willing to deal with the odds of my case and I heard alot of “no”s before finding Teresa and finally getting a yes. I’m thankful for finding her and how my settlement turned out. Happy to move on with my life. I recommend her to anyone who needs justice / guidance and simply someone in their corner willing to fight for them.

Teresa handled a car accident for us. Not only did she obtain a great settlement but she kept us updated the entire time.She is very personable and made herself available to us.  I am definitely recommending her and will return if I ever need to.
Knowledgeable, competent, and seems to really try to center her client's experience in the lawsuit.
I highly recommend Teresa Christian Law, fast, prompt, courteous service very detailed in explaining all details of my case.
Very good attorney, good communication and trustworthy

When searching for a law firm I wanted someone who at least came across as genuine and sincere. After numerous calls to various law firms and tired of "feeling" like my wife and I were just another case or press 1,2 ect, we finally came across Ms. Christian.
She is personable, sincere, and goes above and beyond to communicate.
My wife and I had a very sensitive case and she treated us with grace and compassion the whole way. Not once did we feel like just another client or case.
Ms. Christian, we sincerely appreciate you. If I am ever asked to recommend an attorney. You for sure will be our recommendation.

What can I say about Teresa. We lost our son in March of this year. My husband went through so many lawyers to find this Gem of a person. Due to the situation I just could not come to the terms to even speak with her. My husband did everything. But once I heard her voice I knew I was in good hands. Once I started talking to Teresa I was confident that she had our best interests at heart. She was always forthcoming, truthful even at times it hurted. Teresa never left us in the dark. Always answer email and texts and also reached out to us via phone. Very, very, very responsive is all I have to say. Our case was handled very professionally and expeditiously. Teresa is a great person and great as  a lawyer. I highly recommend Teresa.

I was referred to Teresa by a friend and I am so grateful. We had to do literally everything online and text due to covid shut downs. It was a very challenging and drawn out time to get into doctors and get care. Teresa was great throughout! She helped find available care and get appointments, answered my many questions, was quickly responsive to my check ins and gave informative updates. I would definitely call her again if circumstances required and would refer her to others.

Teresa is great! She navigated my case expertly, and was always quick and thorough in answering my questions. Her fees are reasonable and she's willing to work with you so you get a fair settlement at the end. She gave sound advice concerning the best outcome for my case. I highly recommend her! She dealt with all the insurance and all the medical providers, and made it so easy for me.

When I got into my accident in July 2019 Teresa Christian was a great force to have on my side. Her prompt responses and determination showed through our outcome. Even though I lived 4 hours away from Austin, Texas in Laredo, her services seemed like she was right across the street. The whole process was super seamless and very hassle free. She listened and understood my needs and acted in a swift manner. I will definitely consult her for any future needs.

Teresa Christian is as good as it gets! I was pregnant when my husband and I got in an accident and didn’t know what to do. She made the process seem so smooth and communication was always the best with her! Would recommend her to anyone in need of an amazing personal injury lawyer!

Zero stars!  I guess I had to give her a 1 star to post but ZERO STARS!

Karl and Alexis were amazing. Hands down made my divorce the easiest process for me and I would recommend them to anyone in need. Thank you guys for all that you do!

Carl represented a great friend during her divorce. He set an affordable retainer compared to other attorneys and helped her navigate a very complex custody battle and monetary settlement. I’m thankful she had Carl to represent her interests.

Mrs. Knickerbocker is a great lawyer! As I was facing my complicated divorce, I took a long while to research and find legal representation. When I found Carl Knickerbocker, I immediately knew he was the perfect lawyer, from the first initial conversation all the way through to the final decree. I had a million questions, and he answered them all. His communication is thorough, transparent, and immediate. I felt completely taken care of in the craziness of my complex case. His exceptional expertise and strategic mindset made me feel at ease at every step. His fees are absolutely fair. I highly recommend Carl. He’s the best! Amazing lawyer! He helped one of my dearest friends through a very difficulty divorce and ensured that her needs and her families needs were prioritized. 1000% recommend!
"He is an excellent lawyer, and I highly recommend him for his assistance with my friend Carolyn."

Exceptional divorce lawyer! Carl displayed unparalleled expertise and sensitivity from the initial consultation to the final settlement. Carl ensured my rights were protected. Communication was stellar; prompt responses and clear explanations kept me informed and reassured. Carl's strategic approach led to a favorable outcome, and his empathy made the challenging experience more bearable. His retaining fee was affordable, and billing was transparent. I highly recommend this lawyer for anyone navigating the complex terrain of divorce. Carl's professionalism and commitment to client satisfaction make him an excellent choice of representation.

It’s hard for me to verbalize just how profound of an impact choosing Carl to represent me during my custody case made on my life. For anyone dealing with a high conflict ex-partner, I highly highly recommend him. Carl’s expertise and understanding of the dynamics that play out in court when the other party refused to give up control, saved me years of suffering and strife. His work, not only as an attorney, but as an advocate for reform in the family legal system is a breath of fresh air. Carl, my family and I are eternally grateful for everything you did for us. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Carl truly helped my friend during her divorce. He was available and very responsive. Him and his team provided great representation and ensured all her rights were protected.
My friend used Knickerbocker for her divorce. I would highly recommend him due to how he was able to support her. 5 STARS!!!
Carl helped my friend during a tough time. He was very patient in supporting my friend through the divorce process.

This is the BEST Lawyer in all of Texas hands down.  The retainer was affordable compared to other attorneys.  He genuinely cares about his clients, and doesn't put up with nonsense from the other party in the court.  He was always available when I needed to reach out to him, answered all my questions within 24-48 hours.  He deals with contentious and noncontentious Divorces. He made my Divorce and Custody case a lot less stressful, because I could depend on him.  The best part is that I don't have to worry about my kids safety anymore because the legal paperwork specifies that they live with me, and I choose where we move going forward.  I don't have to worry about my ex showing up at uncalled for hours and days, because the legal paperwork states specific days and times.  I don't have to worry about arguing and fighting because we now have to legally communicate on Our Family Wizard, an app where all the crazy conversations can legally be documented.  Just pay for the retainer, every dollar you spend will be worth the peace of mind that comes with having Carl Knickerbocker as your lawyer.

I will never be able to recommend Carl enough. He is simply unmatched in humanity and depth of skill set. He is  *THE* resource for all things custody and high conflict related. He has the kind of strength and ability to navigate the murkiest of waters that only comes from walking through them yourself. He is some mixture of viper handler, elite strategist & the counselor that gets it more than anyone else you have spoken to. Just hire him.

I used Mr. Knickerbocker’s firm for my recent divorce and child custody/support case that was finalized this May. I appreciated that his consult was a video appointment because I was a new single mom with no vehicle at that time to personally meet him. His consult was thorough and answered all my questions with great patience. He was incredibly professional at court before the judge presiding over my case (I’ve seen other attorneys who were not organized or prepared). I sincerely appreciated Mr. Knickerbocker’s help when I needed it the most as I was leaving a very toxic/abusive situation. Just have patience and understanding that he’s only one attorney and the legal stuff is a lengthy process. I highly recommend.

My friend was represented by him, and (in all the years of her contentious divorce) I have never seen her feel so confident going into or coming out of her court date, because of his exceeding competence at defending her and presenting her case. She has super high standards, so hearing what she shared about his knowledge and skill at handling the case was super impressive to me. I would HIGHLY recommend him.

I had no idea where to turn when I needed an attorney. After googling and reading reviews, I chose to go with Carl Knickerbocker. I am so glad I did. He is very knowledgeable and has a very calming demeanor. He presented facts in my case that ended in a summary judgement in my favor. I highly recommend Carl if you’re needing an attorney.

He was very informative and helpful.
I was in what felt like a hopeless situation regarding child custody with my abusive ex husband. But thankfully Carl helped me nip all of the court bs in the bud.
Thanks again Carl!

I found Mr. Knickerbocker after working with another attorney for 9 months on a child custody case. In that time, I was given the run around and dragged along so much to where my previous lawyer suggested to get someone else. I was made to believe that I still had a long uphill battle due to the uncooperative and unreasonable nature of the opposing side. With my hope dwindling, I was blessed to have found Mr. Knickerbocker and his office- who were really kind and helpful and reassuring to me that he understood where I was coming from and what I was going through. He took on my high-conflict case with no hesitation and full confidence, even with me being 6 hours away from the court. He helped give me back my sense of identity that I was just a parent wanting to be in their child’s life, rather than the bad guy that I was treated like by the opposing side beforehand, which he reassured me that treatment had no standing. He truly listened to me and worked with me. He hit the ground running and went to battle for me and was able to resolve my case in 4 months. He actually held the other side accountable and stopped them from dragging their feet. With Mr. Knickerbocker on my side, he pulled back the curtains on this supposed mountain of a case. And come to find out what seemed like a volcano ready to erupt was no more than a science project paper volcano spewing false fire. He revealed the charade of the opposing party, simplified my case, and got it resolved. I would highly recommend Mr. Knickerbocker to anyone needing help with child custody litigation in the Austin area.
Very quick response. Straight forward and provided a lot of information all within our free consultation. I appreciation his honesty and his direction on our next steps.
We couldn't be happier with the experience and recommend Mr. Knickerbocker to everyone.

I recently had the privilege of having Terence Marsh appointed as my attorney. I was treated respectfully, as an individual and not a criminal.  I had never gotten on the other side of the law until now.  I feared I would be treated differently and not as a respectable citizen.   Terence put my mind at ease immediately.   The instant he heard about my case, he had me out on a PR bond within 24 hours. He was understanding of my situation.  I am very thankful that he was my lawyer and made a frightening situation, for me at least, better.   He was able to negotiate with the prosecutor and dismiss my case.  I'm eternally grateful for his hard work.  I  recommend Terence Marsh to anyone who needs an attorney. Terrence is easily accessible, got back to me quickly, aggressive and got me the results that I wanted. I was able to get full legal custody. Something no other attorney in Austin was able to do. I was awarded the highest amount allotted for child support. I actually had to pay when I had my last attorney. Night and day difference! Terrence is concise and very powerful with his words leaving no stone unturned. Terrence consistently pushed back on the opposing attorney and did not back down! As a result, I was left responsible for all the medical treatment costs they directed me to obtain after accepting my case. Also the whole process they were not trying to help you but always evaluating how much money they can get from the case.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry that you felt disappointed by your experience.

Personal injury cases are initially evaluated based on the information available at intake. As a case progresses, new facts—such as liability concerns, insurance coverage limitations, or medical causation issues—may arise that make it legally or ethically inappropriate for our firm to continue representation. When that occurs, we notify the client promptly so they may pursue other options.

We’d also like to clarify that we do not direct clients to incur medical bills for which they are personally responsible. During representation, treatment referrals are typically made under a Letter of Protection, meaning clients are not billed upfront. Any medical expenses a client remains responsible for generally involve treatment obtained before representation began (such as emergency care) or cases that cannot proceed due to liability or fault issues.

We wish you the best moving forward.

reviews.text: My father has terminal cancer and only three months to live. He wants me to become a U.S. citizen. Friends taking the citizenship test, please don't fill out the forms yourself! A single mistake could lead to serious consequences. I almost passed this time, but then I had to ask a friend to fill out the form and I had to submit additional documents – I regret it so much!

I can’t say enough about how grateful I am for Dustin Fox. I had some legal documents that I was completely overwhelmed by, and without hesitation he jumped in to help me. Even with his busy schedule, he took the time to go through everything carefully and explain it in a way that actually made sense to someone without a legal background.

What stood out most to me was not just his knowledge, but how eager and genuine he was in wanting to help. He didn’t make me feel like I was imposing, even though I wasn’t a paying client — instead, he went out of his way to make sure I understood and felt comfortable with what I was looking at.

Fox’s integrity shows in every interaction. He approaches situations with honesty and fairness, always putting respect for others at the center of how he works. His resilience is equally remarkable — no matter how busy or complex the task, he brings the same calm determination and willingness to find solutions. That combination of integrity, resilience, and respect is rare, and it’s exactly what sets him apart.

That “Fox” personality is exactly why he’s the person you want in your corner: sharp, quick to act, caring, and personable. He has this rare ability to balance being a true professional while also making you feel at ease, which is exactly what you need.

I’m incredibly thankful for his support and would recommend him to anyone — not only because he’s an amazing lawyer, but because he’s an amazing person.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing such a thoughtful review. It truly means a lot to me and my team to know that the time and effort we put into helping others makes a real difference. My goal is always to simplify the legal process and make people feel supported, no matter how complex the documents or situation may be.

Your kind words about integrity, resilience, and respect reflect exactly the values I strive to bring to every interaction, and I’m grateful that came through in your experience. At DFox Law, we believe that caring for people comes first, and everything else follows from that.

I’m so glad I could provide clarity and peace of mind for you, and I truly appreciate your trust and recommendation. Thank you again for letting me be in your corner.

reviews.text:
My professional experience with D. Fox Law began with an accident in my car. This accident happened like most accidents do; minding your own business, driving down the road, totally unexpected. On my way to my office a motorcycle smashed into my car! The motorcyclist was breaking the law and that’s what caused the accident. What should have been a cut and dry case of liability ended up being an insurer trying to muddy the waters and unethically blame me for the accident. Even the police report explanation of the accident shows that liability should have landed firmly on the other party’s plate.

I’ve had two decades of experience in this particular industry (insurance; specifically adjusting claims), and after my first interaction with the motorcyclist’s adjuster, I KNEW this was not going to be taken care of properly. I needed a professional negotiator with litigation experience that dealt with accidents.

My first call was to D. Fox Law.

Now keep in mind, this Insurance Carrier is one of the top three Carriers in the nation. They are not a small company! Counselor Fox took care of the issue at hand. His firm sent letters, they called, and in less than two weeks resolved the problem of assigning liability. I’m not sure exactly what he said or did, but when the motorcyclists adjuster called me personally to let me know that they had reconsidered, and that they would be accepting 100% liability, I knew D. Fox Law had made them see the light.

Counselor Fox did an outstanding job.
Great Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. It makes me very pleased that we were able to obtain the precise results you desired!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are sincerely sorry to hear about your dissatisfaction and take your concerns seriously. At RRK Law, we are committed to providing the highest level of service and integrity in all our dealings. While we cannot comment on specific cases due to strict confidentiality obligations, we assure you that we always operate within the legal and ethical frameworks that govern our profession.
We understand that legal processes can be complex and sometimes outcomes may not align with the expectations of all parties involved. However, we want to reassure everyone that we diligently work to represent our clients' interests and strive for the best possible outcomes under the law.
We take allegations of misconduct very seriously. As such, we are currently pursuing appropriate legal channels to address and resolve this matter, including seeking a court order for the removal of content that we believe to be defamatory and not reflective of our firm's values and practices.
We appreciate the trust our clients place in us and remain dedicated to upholding the highest standards of the legal profession. For anyone seeking more information about our services and our firm's track record, we invite you to contact us directly or visit our website.
We thank you for your understanding and continued trust.

reviews.text:
I cannot say enough about this personal injury law firm and the way they handled my case.

What started as one car accident turned into a secondary accident, multiple head injuries, and a very complicated traumatic brain injury situation. Insurance companies do not make that easy. When you are dealing with brain injuries, medical documentation, overlapping claims, and trying to function as a special needs mom, everything becomes convoluted very quickly.

Todd and I have been friends for years, which is why I trusted him. But what truly impressed me was not just the friendship. It was the professionalism, organization, and coordination of the entire team. They operate as one well organized, cohesive unit. Communication was clear. Everything was explained in a way I could understand, even when I was struggling cognitively. Calls were returned. Questions were answered. They advocated for me as if I were family.

Living through traumatic brain injury is humbling. The stuttering. The confusion. Not being able to multitask. Losing my temper. Not being able to tolerate my children crying for more than a few seconds. As a mom of a child with Level 3 autism and another child who also has unique needs, that season was incredibly hard. I had to educate myself and become an expert in my own health because I did not always feel the medical system was guiding me in a way that was beneficial. This firm gave me stability and support on the legal side so I could focus on healing and being present for my family.

They handled the insurance companies. They navigated the complexity. They made an overwhelming personal injury case manageable.

The settlement was not some flashy headline number. It was exactly what it needed to be. Enough to help us move forward wisely. Enough to invest in healing. Enough to change our trajectory without changing who we are.

I was able to invest in hyperbaric oxygen therapy among other therapies that will help both myself and children. It has been profoundly beneficial not only for me as someone healing from traumatic brain injury, but also for my daughter with Level 3 non speaking autism and for my son as well. That investment is life changing because it created a permanent space in our lives for healing and autonomy. It means I will always have tools to help my daughter move toward finding her voice and advocating for herself in the future.

Every part of this journey carried a lesson. I thank God for that. And I am deeply grateful to Todd and this entire team for their role in where we are now and where we are going.

If you are looking for a car accident attorney or personal injury law firm that treats you like a human being, communicates clearly, fights hard with insurance companies, and operates with integrity, this is the team you want in your corner.

From my heart to yours, thank you.

reviews.text: This company is hired by my law firm to handle the lien resolution on my case.  Very poor and slow.  I have been waiting for 20 months on my settlement.

Everyone is right, it's a terrible company. They are completely useless. They just give you the runaround. The only solution is to hire an attorney, which many cannot afford to do, but if you can, do it.

This place is a joke they told me 2 months ago they were going to send me a email asking how i wanted to get my $! I keep getting the run around. They wont give me my settlement and im struggling with my bills right now!  Id give them 0 stars!!!

What kind of business is this you can never reach anyone and when you do the people that answer the phone talk to you like dirt I've never been treated so disrespectful and discourteous in my life. Worst company ever I hope that the next attorney or business that decides to utilize this company will think twice horrible horrible customer service
They're just a really good part of Napoli/Skolnik Law Firm. They're the ones who handles settlement payments
Customer service was extremely rude and unprofessional.

I’ve been calling everyday (except Sundays) now for two weeks straight.  I leave a message only after holding for 12+ minutes waiting for anyone to answer the phone.  No one has returned any of my calls.  All I need is a status on my case.

I implore law firms NOT to use this company, as it will only further aggravate your client(s).  This has been a grueling enough process without being flatly ignored by Archer Systems.  Shame on this company!

Same story new day they actually caused more problems than helped I show them facts and proof they tell me wait Months for follow ups call and you get transferred hung up on ask for a manager they have you waiting meanwhile your funds are being held up loads of stress wish I never dealt with this company ever will be filing a complaint ASAP

I wish I could give ZERO stars. Customer service is not in their vocabulary. They change their phone options all the time- requiring you to know an extension number or leave a message. I’ve done that twice now with no return call. The one time I talked to an agent, she was very rude and tried giving me general information despite having my case pulled up. Asking for a supervisor did help in that I got specifics to MY claim. But even that information turned out to be inaccurate. Very frustrating to deal with company.

This company does nothing but give you the run around. They have had 13 months to resolve what they were initially contracted for, and nothing has moved forward. They do not keep up on communications with lawyers, and also can’t answer their phones or return calls.
I think they are a scam. Someone takes your information and then doesn't call back. Fill out the callback form and no one responds. They are in business to collect money, not perform a service.

Poor customer service and communication. It took over twenty-five minutes for me to find out I would need to call back again about my claim, which was received by this company 21 days earlier. Apparently this company's internal business processes are antiquated and need to be updated. Pain and suffering that's the only service this company provides.

Promises made by employees AND MANAGERS but are constantly broken!
My final check was supposed to have been issued 4 months ago and still nothing! Have been speaking with Ms. Lopez but she has nit returned any of my phone calls for almost 2 weeks now! This is the absolute worst company ever!  Hope no one ever has too deal with this company........EVER!

Archer Systems is a pleasure to work with for settlement administration for mass tort litigation. I appreciate their open communication, quick response time, and clear expectations and guidelines. Employees are very professional and offer assistance as needed during each step of the process.

This is a VERY bad company to have to deal with. Court appointed to my law firm. In my opinion they have no business being in business. I would LOVE to complain to the courts or whoever I needed to complain to. They take the money that has been settled on and then do NOT take care of what needs to be done. I had to go on Medicare site and pay off remainder of monies owed myself! And now all is paid off and I'm still waiting on money that they have already received on my behalf. How are they getting away with this?

this company drags their feet and will hold you settlement money for over a year. I have told them several times that I went to the hospital one time for injuries that I need a dentist not a doctor. I have been 3 years without my crowns in my mouth and they have got my funds for the dentist but will not release them to me. I could have had my dental work done for a year now but I have to wait on Archer to look Once a month  tn there computor  for any liens I might have against me. what they are doing is a crime.
He’s not good, my child been sitting and still no help, their not working hard enough

As a family member of a client represented by Marc Chavez, I’m extremely disappointed in his performance. He failed to request discovery, gave little to no communication with the family, and even misled the judge about staying in contact. Instead of defending the case, he pressured my brother to accept the prosecutor’s offer without reviewing the evidence. In my experience, this attorney did not act in his client’s best interest, and I cannot recommend him to anyone seeking serious legal defense.”

I literally had an aggravated assault charge with a deadly weapon with a theft and a criminal mischief charge and with no evidence and all the proof that I had that I didn’t do it , Within eight months they dismissed and disposed all of those charges and Marc Chavez is the best Attorney, including his crew.

There are truly no words that can fully express the gratitude our family feels for Natalia and Ashleigh. From the very beginning of this journey, Natalia has been nothing short of a blessing in our lives. What felt overwhelming and uncertain at times became possible because she stood by our side through every step, every process, and every question we had.

This immigration journey has been one of the most emotional experiences our family has ever gone through. There were moments of fear, stress, and uncertainty, but Natalia and Ashleigh never left us feeling alone. Their kindness, patience, and dedication gave us hope when we needed it most.

Today we are in Ciudad Juárez, a moment we prayed for over and over again. It is hard to believe we have made it this far, and we truly could not have done it without them. Natalia didn’t just do her job — she genuinely cared about our family and our future, and that made all the difference.

They have impacted our lives in a way we will never forget. Because of them, our family now has the opportunity for a better future. We will forever carry deep gratitude in our hearts for everything they have done for us.♥️

We pray that many other families will have the same blessing of working with Natalia and Ashleigh. They are truly incredible at what they do, and we wish them nothing but continued success because they are changing lives for the better. 🙏
reviews.ownerResponse:
Samantha, thank you so much for this very kind review. It means a lot to us. You are right, Natalia is a blessing to all she encounters! It's been a pleasure working with you and your family. Again, thank you so much. Blessings to you and your family.

Ashleigh

reviews.text:

She treated my case not as a business transaction, but as something personal and important to my family. The sessions were clear and precise, and she efficiently and professionally handled every detail. With her expert help and the blessing of my Creator, I obtained my work permit and permanent residency.

“ALWAYS GRATEFUL”
Rosalio S.P.
“Blessed be attorney Ashleigh and her team.”

reviews.text:
Best experience w a lawyer that I've ever had. They patiently explain answers to all of your questions and concerns and don't act like you are wasting their time. Reasonably priced.

We ended up with a kind of emergency situation at the end of our visa process. Due to incredibly slow processing at the embassy, we basically ended up with a visa that was valid for 2 days after it was recieved. We were incredibly pressed for time and had many last minute questions. Ms. Hutchens made herself available to help us rapidly on the weekend and was immediately available for random urgent phone calls during the week. We needed to make decisions with zero time to spare, and Ms. Hutchens helped us make it happen and get our family member home. I am sure that with another law firm we would have heard "Mr so-and-so will get back to you as soon as possible". If we had gone with another lawyer, I think it would be very likely that our family member would not have made it back and would have been stuck in another country for who knows how long.

Thank you so much, Ashleigh and Juan.

reviews.text: Juan / Ashleygh were very good at their job. They were attentive to my case, answering messages and calls all the time, even on weekends. I recommend them. They are very professional. I greatly admire the dedication they have towards their clients. I am forever grateful.

reviews.text: I was looking for an expert opinion for my international case that required Mexico and Unites States law knowledge. I contacted Loit & Associates. When they delivered their expert opinion, my financial team was very impressed at the quality of the report. My financial team of experts has worked with lawyers all over the world, and Loit & Associates report stood out because it was very clear, concise and through. The financial team liked it so much that they contacted LOIT & associates and are going to recommend them for future clients.

I’m deeply grateful to the team at Loit & Associates for their outstanding support in securing my work visa. From the very first contact, they were completely transparent about the costs, I knew exactly what the entire process would entail, with no hidden fees or surprises.
Their dedication and personalized attention were exceptional. They guided me through every step with clarity and care, helping me gather and complete all the required documents flawlessly. Thanks to their meticulous organization and unmatched professionalism, I received my visa in less than 15 days!
I highly recommend Loit & Associates to anyone in need of visa or immigration assistance. They are truly experts: efficient, reliable, and a pleasure to work with.

I had an excellent experience with the lawyers who helped me with my work visa process. The service was fast, efficient, and had a very positive outcome. They were always available to answer my questions and guide me every step of the way. I especially want to highlight Mónica's attention; she was very professional and attentive throughout the entire process. 100% recommended.
Monica is very resourceful and helpful!!!

Excellent attention and service. We contacted them to begin the process of obtaining a TN work visa for one of our employees. They initially answered all our questions by phone, and then sent us all the information regarding this type of visa and its associated costs via email. This helped us understand the process much better, and we were able to make the right decision to hire them to handle our case with the immigration authorities.

We are very satisfied with this firm's service. They are truly effective, efficient, punctual, and offer the added benefit of personalized attention. Our process has now concluded successfully, and our company has just welcomed our employee back with an approved TN visa.

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED

I would like to express my gratitude to the team for their excellent attention and service during the processing of my TN and TD visas for my daughters. It was an efficient and thorough process, and they were always available to assist me. Their professionalism and kindness made the process much easier.

Thank you very much!

Excellent service! The staff at this company are incredibly attentive, friendly, and respectful at every step of the process. I wholeheartedly recommend them for any paperwork; they make everything simpler and easier, pay attention to every detail, and are always ready to answer questions and support their clients!

Thank you so much!

Donna and Richard first of all would like to say thank you Monica our attorney for such a wonderful experience with your firm through the years and present. My husband and I purchased a villa in Cozumel Mexico 9 years ago. We had a problem with getting our deed from the seller. The seller was paid in full but refused to release the paperwork needed to show it was paid in full. We had no problem getting it that was easy the rest not so easy a nightmare.
I started my search for attorney that practice law in Mexico so I called one in Dallas Tx. The gentleman I spoke with said he doesn’t do it anymore but he knows attorney that does. I was already stressed out and didn’t know if I was going to get someone that could help. He gave me the number to Loit and Associates in Austin Tx
I said thank you and happy the law firm was close to us.
I called spoke with one of the ladies explaining the situation she said she would have the attorney get back with me.
I thought it would take forever but no it was the same day. I met Monica the attorney in Austin to talk and handle some paperwork to get things going.
When I say this attorney doesn’t waste any time she was on it like a kid eating candy. She gathered up everything I had and went to work. These dealings were in Guadalajara
Mexico. She was there handling business for us. I could not believe it I was feeling so bad to the bone I said that’s what I’m talking about they don’t know who they dealing with lol. This attorney doesn’t play she is on point very confident and knows her stuff. When she has to add more fighting power she pulls out more ammunition. This was quite an experience for us and we thought we had made a mistake but we didn’t. Everything she does she will get with you and ask you questions and how you feel about certain routes to take. She is very up front with pricing and very reasonable. She traveled back and forth for us and got the end results Our Deed to the property. Our neighbor in the next villa over had the same situation we told them about Monica they called her and they got their deed after 9 years.
Anything to do with Mexico is done through our attorney we call and she delivers each and every time.
We have used her for helping us with our small business we are opening up soon she has had to run interference for us on the whole process with people trying to take advantage of us because we didn’t understand certain things. All is going really good and so excited.
We have just returned from Mexico she met us there to help with our permanent residence which we also received. Our outcome with this law firm is amazing. There are other partners there as well Anthony is another one. Please know that if you are interested in purchasing any property or residence in Mexico please contact this firm. We were in a really bad situation back then and could have lost a lot not really knowing what we were doing. Please don’t do anything with out attorney they know the law and they will go to bat for you. They travel where ever you need them to be for you. Fees are very reasonable and they work very well for you. We just recently returned April 27 2024 with our permanent residence. We have been with this law firm now for 9 years and counting Amazing service and awesome attorney to have. Thank you Monica attorney at Loit and Associates. Donna and Richard.
Im very thankful for all the support and advice provided by Monica Loyo, she’s very knowledgeable, and prompt responding any questions I had related to immigration and dual citizenship.

I highly recommend Loit & Associates for legal counsel. They assisted me in resolving a challenging family situation related to family heritage that even other lawyers predicted that it was nearly impossible to resolve. Their knowledge, professionalism, and efficiency in expediting the process were exceptional. I am extremely satisfied with their services and grateful for their expertise in navigating such a complex matter.

Although Loit & Associates couldn't take my case because they are not certified to practice in Los Algodones, Monica was super nice and provided me with useful information and advice. Thank you so much, Monica.

Monica was amazing! After my husband passed away, I needed the original Fideicomiso title changed to my name (not an easy feat) - both my late husband and I are US Citizens.  The system is cumbersome and complicated.  Monica walked me through the steps and assisted with the transactions/steps.  Once that piece was finalized, she assisted with the sale of the property which is quite different than USA real estate transactions.  She reviewed all documents and walked me through the process.
Monica is very competent and her English is perfect.  High recommend if anyone needs legal counsel in Mexico.

Loits & Associates was instrumental in my purchase of a pre-sale apartment in Tulum. Their team not only thoroughly reviewed all documents, including contracts and permits, but also efficiently coordinated requests for information with the seller. Their in-depth research provided invaluable security throughout the entire process. From the beginning to the signing of the contract, their commitment and professionalism were evident. I am grateful for their comprehensive advice and their ability to ensure a smooth and secure transaction. I would recommend Loits & Associates without hesitation!

Monica is an amazingly accomplished and competent attorney. She is licensed to practice in Mexico AND in the United States, and she has practiced law in both countries. As a lawyer myself, I know that alone is a very impressive accomplishment. It also speaks to her advanced English language skills. These abilities and Monica's friendly nature and sensible and pragmatic approach to problem-solving result in excellent, yet affordable, legal services for people in the U.S. who need assistance in Mexico.

I was referred to Monica to set up a Mexican (LLC-like) corporation to be used to purchase a home, as a means to avoid having to use the "fideicomiso" land trust option, which has its disadvantages. Monica walked me through the steps of forming the corporation then assisted me in purchasing a home near the beach in Baja California. With her help I saved thousands of dollars in the purchase process, which in this region can get very expensive with the blizzard of fees those involved in the real estate industry tack onto the home price.

Meanwhile, Monica assisted me in obtaining Permanent Residency immigration status in a convenient and, considering one is dealing with a government agency, very timely fashion. She even put up with my speaking in Spanish during our conversions but would switch into her excellent English when needed to ensure I really understood the specifics of the transaction.

Overall, Monica is competent, knowledgeable and friendly, and she helped me achieve the result I wanted, which I could not have achieved without her help. You really cannot ask for more.
It has been very rewarding working with Loit & Associates. They are excellent lawyers, they resolve problems very well, and they are very attentive.

Excellent professionalism and ability to work quickly and efficiently. They resolved my problems swiftly and were highly prepared, answering my questions and guiding me through the visa application process.

For several years I tried to obtain a work visa with other lawyers; I spent thousands of dollars and countless hours without success. When I met Attorney Monica, she helped and advised me throughout the process, making it much easier. Fortunately, I obtained my work visa thanks to her assistance, and that's why I'm taking the time to highly recommend the firm LOIT & Associates.

Highly recommended. I've used their services twice for my TN visa application. They provide excellent guidance on the steps to follow. They provide personalized service, which is important for this type of process.
Don't hesitate to contact them.
The service is excellent, the process I requested was very quick, as were my appointments. I wholeheartedly recommend LOIT & Associates. Thank you to Monica for everything.
Great service, efficient, they my head firm for all of my inmigration proceedings with all with possitive results.
Excellent service, attorney Monica guided me through the entire process of obtaining my work visa to be legally in the USA without any problems or setbacks.

I would highly recommend this firm for your Wills and Trusts. Fantastic service! We have known Regina since 2015.  She and her staff are very professional and explain everything in detail. We feel very confident with this Law Firm and their expertise in this area.
We received above and beyond service! We felt cared for as we were walked through updating our estate planning, moving to the Hill Country from out of state. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
Excellent responsive understandable advice.

I absolutely have no words for the kindness I have been shown by Regina, Kim, and Andrew.  They handled my father’s will and trust and made the entire process go so smoothly. I then hired them to do my will and trust. They’ve answered all of my questions very quickly and have been incredibly supportive and professional throughout the process. I highly recommend Slaton-Schauer Law Firm for your estate planning.

Slaton Schauer Law Firm in Cedar Park, TX consulted and prepared a trust for me. Regina, Kim and Andrew were so personable, efficient, professional and thorough in conducting my affairs. I highly recommend the firm for estate planning needs.
M. K. Denny
A very professional and warm practice, with utmost integrity and honesty. I felt very welcomed and comfortable, and received thorough and wise counsel. Highly recommend! A++

reviews.text:
Slaton Schauer Law Firm

I wish I could post more than five stars for this wonderful law firm.
After recently being the executor of my mother’s estate, I realized that my will from 45 years ago was woefully out of date and I needed to get my estate into a trust.  I could not use my mother’s estate firm as they are in California, but they highly recommended this law firm.
When I returned to Texas, I gave them a call and they set up an initial meeting less than a week away. Kim was my first point of contact, and she made sure that I got a good head start on what I needed to consider and bring to the introductory meeting.
I met with Regina a few days later and she walked me through the entire process under Texas law and explained every detail I asked about in a way that made sense to me. I walked away from that meeting with a much broader view of how I wanted to structure my trust.
I made what I thought was a comprehensive outline of what I wanted and submitted it by email. Kim got back to me a few days later and we walked through my outline and she pressed me for as much detail as possible in order to have the finished trust meet my expectations.
In the end, the signing meeting went flawlessly.  We didn’t need to change a single word and I cannot imagine how it could have been better planned, constructed or executed.  From start to finish, the process and end result were clear, concise and exactly what I wanted. Both Regina and Kim are exceptional at what they do and how they do it.  I look forward to working with them over the years as life changes things.
(Six stars…)
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for the incredible five-star review, James! We are truly honored by your kind words and thrilled that we could help you navigate the process of updating your Estate Plan and creating a customized Trust.

It’s wonderful to hear that Kim and Regina provided you with the support and clarity you needed to feel confident in your decisions. At Slaton Schauer Law Firm, we pride ourselves on making estate planning clear, concise, and tailored to each client’s unique situation. We are so glad the process went smoothly from start to finish, and we’ll always be here to help as your estate planning needs evolve over the years.

Thank you for trusting us with such an important task, and we look forward to continuing to work with you in the future!

reviews.text:
Regina Schauer is the best!
I attended 3 of her and Andrew Slaton's seminars before hiring Regina to completely rewrite my Trust.
Because I have a complicated family, I do  not want to leave any room for misunderstanding when I pass.  My estate is small.  But I am aware that family members can get hurt over small things during grief and stressful situations like the death of a loved one.  So, I'm trying to prevent any conflict when I am no longer here.
Because I have witnessed family disagreements, I wanted to make sure my affairs are clear.  So, in 2014 I developed, with an attorney, my Trust.  However, over the years I have altered this Trust.  I find such matters confusing.  I'm always open to learning, thus I continued to read and attend various seminars.  I could not believe how many shortcomings were in my Trust.  So, I continued to attend seminars and read and study the details.  Finally, I decided to totally rewrite my Trust with Regina's help.  The difference is amazing.
My new Trust is so organized.  All possibilities are covered.  There should be no confusion.
I found Regina patient in explaining complicated areas.  Her office is low stress and pleasant.  She is knowledgeable and thorough.  I left with an organized binder and confident I have done everything possible.  I am motivated to get all of my paperwork in order.  I know if I have questions I can call Regina's office and get answers.  It is one of the best things a person can leave to their loved ones, a roadmap to handling property, financial affairs, and clear direction to prevent family disputes and hurt feelings when you are no longer here to explain and love them.

It's wonderful to hear that you felt supported and confident throughout the process. We take pride in ensuring that our clients fully understand every aspect of their estate planning and Trust, and we’re happy to know that Regina’s patience and thoroughness helped clarify any complexities.

Silverleaf seminar was very informative and entertaining with the presentation. Worth the time.

Pretty sad when you do all of the leg work and simply ask a clerk who gives you a 20 minute free consultation to have the Attorney call to see if he is interested in a million dollar probate case on a 30% contingency basis and it is already filed with a court date and they want to charge me $400.00 just to speak with him.
Very greedy and very sad considering most Attorneys not only provide a free consultation but also would jump at a case like this with little work to be done!

If you’re looking for an attorney who is knowledgeable, thorough, and truly client‑focused, we highly recommend Tom Fortenberry and the Silverleaf Legal Group. He made the entire process smooth and gave us real peace of mind.

reviews.text: We have a special needs adult daughter with an Intellectual Disability. He listened and responded with knowledge and sound advice. He utilized the information and facts we gave his office. He included another seasoned attorney Peter Lopez in his office and senior paralegal Arlette Martinez, whom together their team properly and timely responded to all the deadlines, us and knew the people at Williamson County. Our outcome was better than expected! God blessed us with Mark and his office handling these cases!
Mr. Mark Morales and Associates did a great job in helping my son with his case. He got parole. He'll be home soon. Thank you guys 😊

I am so thankful for Mark Morales and his team! After almost ten years they are bringing my husband home. Mark, you and Diana have been the biggest blessing in this process. Mark is the best parole attorney out there and I highly recommend him to everyone!

reviews.text: Excellent experience! Mark represented my husband for his first eligible parole date and represented him again for free for the next eligible date! He was approved and granted parole. Matthew 7:7-8 reads, "Ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock and it will be opened to you. For everyone who asks receives, and he who seeks finds, and to him who knocks it will be opened." My brother served 21 years in prison. I would have calls with him that would break my heart to the core. He would say, "Brother, I need to get out of here already." We asked the Lord and looked then knocked on The Offices of Mark Morales. The Lord fulfilled His promise to us through them! My brother made parole. The Lord is faithful and so were the offices of Mark Morales. Forever grateful!!

reviews.text:
MY BROTHER IS COMING HOME!!

We are incredibly grateful to Mark Morales, his assistant Jennifer, and the entire office staff for their dedication, professionalism, and faith throughout my brother’s parole process. This was his third parole hearing, and after being denied twice with a different attorney, my father decided to hire Mark—and we’re so thankful he did.

Mark got the job done. After serving 14 years on a 20-year sentence, my brother was finally granted parole. This was something we had been praying and hoping for, and Mark’s experience and commitment truly made the difference.

Throughout the process, the office kept my father and sister fully informed every step of the way. Their communication, care, and compassion meant so much to our family during such a stressful time.

What truly stood out to us is that this is a faith-based law office. They believe in the power of prayer, and their compassion and faith were evident in every step of the journey. We sincerely thank Mark, Jennifer, and the entire team for their support, guidance, and belief in our family. May God continue to bless them in the work they do for others.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Cristy for the kind words, it was an honor to represent your brother. God bless you all!

reviews.text: Everyone here as has been amazing! Mainly working with peter and arlette they have showed me nothing but kindness! After not knowing what wasgoing on. Very good  your in the best hands. Mark morales got me parole in 2/1 2 years on a 12 your sentence. He really represents you to the fullest!

Mark Morales and Jennifer are so great!! My husband is coming home on a FI2 in July 2025! Mark was so great, he said all the perfect things! Jennifer his assistant is amazing too, she is by your side the entire way! I couldn’t imagine having any other attorney by our side!! Jennifer and Mark were also very close to my mom and treated her like family, and I couldn’t be more thankful, my mom loved Jennifer and mark also, as she used them as well and they are were so sweet to my momma in which whom I lost a year ago!! If you are looking for a parole attorney..you will not be disappointed!! Thank you again Mark Morales and Jennifer, I been screaming to the roof top all morning and crying with tears of joy!!!!

Mark Morales first impressed me by telling me the truth: “Gary, I’m not going to promise you I can get you home; that is God’s will…His work.” Mark never said, ”if”, but “when” in reference to me coming home; that kind of honest humility and commitment to serving God faithfully instead of himself showed me I had the right team in my corner. Mark immediately set out to contacting family and myself, read everything we provided, and obviously did an excellent job of presenting me to the Parole Board as a man instead of a number, and helped me bring home the fact that I am in a position to be a great benefit to society and my community - as my history in TDCJ had evidenced. Me. Morales convinced the Board to allow me to put actions to our words…and they let me go: my first parole attempt after a thirty-year incarceration.
I would, and will recommend Mark Morales and his team to anyone in need of his help - providing the individual in question can and will put God first; that is because that is what makes Mr.Morales successful: he serves a greater purpose than to get rich, and a greater Rewarder for it.
reviews.ownerResponse:
I am humbled by your review. God is good! We thank Him, because without Him, I am nothing. It was an honor to serve you & to be a small part of you coming home. God bless.

-Mark

reviews.text: I was sentenced to 38 years on a murder charge and was not eligible for parole until 19 years. Word around the system was murder charges rarely made parole the first time up. Well, I beat the odds and Mark Morales and his team played a large part in my newfound freedom. Because of their representation I am now able to prove to society that I’m not only a productive member of society, I have become a pillar of the community, just  like I was privileged enough to be within the prison walls. They did a fantastic job making sure the parole board seen the good man I have became and all of my accomplishments during my sentence. Most important is the prayer and faith they were sure to put foremost in the entire process.
reviews.ownerResponse: We thank you, and we thank the Almighty for the success. We pray nothing but the best for you and your family and we know God has great plans for you! God bless, Mark

reviews.text: Nice respectful place

I just called Terry Garrett to inquire on estate planning services for my grandparents. Her attitude was so harsh and condescending for asking basic questions that I ended the call before we even got started. Hard pass. Change your attitude.

Terry was organized, thorough, compassionate, and an amazing advocate for my late grandparents and mother.  She had a plan for every hurdle that popped up and streamlined the process moving forward.  I recommend The Garrett Law Firm for end of life and estate planning. I’ll be using the firm to arrange my own affairs.
Terry is amazing. She helped us transfer my guardianship from another state and add my husband as a co-guardian since Texas allows it.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you.  I enjoyed working with you and wish you and your family all the best in your new location.

reviews.text:
We are exceedingly grateful to Terry for her guidance on our recent family issue. Her direction helped us to avoid what could have been highly detrimental to our family and ensured the best result possible for a very difficult situation.  When the situation evolved, she ensured that we knew how to adjust to it. We never felt personally judged, but that our issues were well understood.

We appreciate that she clearly stays up to date with not only issues directly related to her work, but with those which are ancillary to that work, understanding that that knowledge will be helpful for her clients.

We give Terry our highest recommendation.

reviews.text: Terry Garrett latched onto and indefatigably persisted in researching and constructing the solid foundation in a case opposing guardianship. reviews.text:
When my brother died suddenly in the summer of 2021, I was completely at a loss as to how to proceed as he lived in Austin, Texas and I live outside Washington, DC.  A cousin's probate attorney referred me to Terry Garrett.  It was the best possible choice I could have made.  Over Zoom, she very clearly explained what the process in Texas would be if there was a will or if there wasn't, and provided very clear fact sheets describing every step of the process for me to refer to as needed.

As it turned out, there was no will which meant there was a longer process to determine heirship.  The flat fee arrangement offered by her office was a great benefit through the lengthy process of obtaining court recognition as my brother's heir.  It meant I felt free to email her office at any time if  I had a question or concern without worrying about cost. When I was the executor of my parents' estate, each time I contacted the attorney in that case, there was another charge of $200-300.  I can report that anytime I had a question, I knew that I would receive a response within 24 hours, if not the same day -- even on the weekend!

Because Ms. Garrett and her associates were so conscientious about the case and ensured that documents were filed promptly, my petition was before the court and settled before the end of the year.  (keep in mind because of Covid there were extremely delays in dealing with government officials everywhere.)  I would highly recommend Ms. Garrett to anyone facing the need to deal with a family members' estate.
reviews.ownerResponse: Many thanks!  We try to make things go smoothly in what is inevitably a difficult time.

Save your self find someone else

⭐☆☆☆☆
“If you’re looking for justice — look elsewhere.”

Sidney was my court-appointed lawyer. I came in with evidence. I left with betrayal.

From day one, I was silenced, delayed, and emotionally dismissed. I had to fight harder against my own defense than the actual system that arrested me. Emails ignored. Evidence buried. Affidavits sidelined. And when the pressure got high? He folded.

Instead of advocating, he panicked. Instead of defending, he deflected.
He even tried to scare me with my own wife — forgetting law, forgetting ethics, forgetting humanity.

This man didn’t just mishandle a case.
He mishandled a mother’s tears, a family’s pain, and a citizen’s trust.

Do your due diligence.
Check the cameras.
Then check your conscience before you hire.
Want the receipts 🧾?
Follow me on X @FoldFlixMcRat

reviews.text:
As a mother living in another state, the feeling of helplessness when my son was in jail and I couldn’t be there for him was overwhelming. He had no one — no family nearby, no one to bail him out, no support. But then came Sidney Williams.

This man didn’t just talk — he acted. He drove all the way from Houston to Austin the same day, personally bailed my son out, and handled everything. He moved faster than I thought possible, and got my son released just in time before he had to report to work. Without Sidney, who knows how long he would’ve been stuck in there.

No other lawyer would have done that. Not same day. Not with that kind of heart.

Sidney Williams is a rare kind of man — someone who treats your child like his own. He gave me peace in a moment of deep fear and gave my son hope when he felt abandoned. I pray Allah/God blesses him tenfold for the way he showed up for our family when no one else could.
If you need a lawyer who actually cares — Sidney is the one.

I highly recommend Sidney Williams. From day one, he approached my case with understanding and strategy. He didn’t just show up for court — he showed up for me. He made sure I was informed, respected, and protected. His rates were more than fair, and his dedication was priceless. You won’t find many lawyers like him. What see you waiting for? CALL HIM Right away!

reviews.text: Mr. Fostel’s reviews referencing his compassion, dedication and commitment to his prior clients held true throughout the two years that it took to finalize a settlement in my Personal Injury case due to a MVA that was not my fault. His concern for my health and recovery from my injuries was always at the forefront of our conversations. I am incredibly grateful to Mr. Fostel and his firm for delivering in the way they did. I highly recommend Clay to represent anyone needing a Personal Injury Attorney.

The accident happened June 2021, so in the midst of the pandemic and delays left and right, my car repairs took longer than expected to complete. reviews.text:
Treaty Oak Legal: Professionalizing Household Employment

We engaged Treaty Oak Legal to professionalize the hiring process for a new nanny who resides on our property. Given the complexities of having an employee living in our home, we wanted to ensure we were fully protected and compliant regarding both labor laws and property rights.

The team provided exceptional guidance. They drafted a comprehensive employment agreement that clearly defined duties and compensation. More importantly, they structured a separate housing agreement that addressed the living arrangement without creating unintended tenancy issues. This specific legal distinction was critical for us and demonstrated their high level of expertise.

Their approach was sophisticated yet practical. They understood that while this is a domestic role, it requires the same legal rigor as any corporate hire. I appreciate their attention to detail and their ability to mitigate risk for my family while keeping the tone fair for our new hire.

Treaty Oak is outstanding!
reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your kind words! Our mission at Treaty Oak Legal is to provide employers with the sophisticated legal infrastructure they need to hire with confidence. We are particularly proud of our team’s work in structuring housing and employment agreements that protect our clients' property rights and professionalize the relationship. Thank you for trusting us with your family’s legal needs.

Despite the time billed, the engagement did not result in meaningful progress or a resolution. When I shared feedback and expressed disappointment, there was no attempt to address the concerns or improve the outcome.
